OR pressing "Cancel" in the modal dismisses the modal

summary: Samsung Only - User exits from Home page
description:
GIVEN a user has launched the MLB.tv app on a Samsung TV
AND the user is on the Home page
AND a feed select modal is not displayed (feeds/blackout/other messaging)

steps.action:
WHEN the user short presses the "Return" key on a bluetooth remote control
OR the user short presses the "Return" key on an IR remote control
steps.result: THEN the user should be presented with the Exit screen

summary: Samsung Only - User Sees proper background image on Exit Confirmations screen
description: GIVEN the user is on the mlb app on Samsung tv

steps.action:
WHEN the user triggers the exit key by pressing the exit button on the IR remote
OR the user triggers the exit key by pressing and holding the Return button on the Bluetooth remote
steps.result:
THEN the Exit confirmation screen appears
AND the background image should be rendered from branding service

NOTE: this is the link from the branding service - https://img.mlbstatic.com/mlb-mobile/oms/branding/mlbtv/welcome/MLB-0-c3b6338e-c939-4788-9e46-67369048b2ab

summary: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
description: GIVEN a user is on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN "Terms of Service and Privacy Policy" has focus
steps.result:
THEN the following text appears on the left side of the screen, 
"MLB’s Terms of Service and policies, including Privacy Policy, apply. 

Please visit mlb.com/tou for Terms of Service. 

Please visit mlb.com/privacy for Privacy Policy.

Please visit mlb.com/do-not-sell-or-share-my-personal-data to opt out of targeted advertising and tracking."

summary: Following Teams - Navigation/Focus
description: GIVEN the MLB app is launched

steps.action:
WHEN the user is on the Following Teams page
AND the user presses the up/down/left/right directional buttons on the controller
OR the users moves the left analog stick up/down/left/right
steps.result:
THEN focus is indicated with a white border around the team tiles
OR focus is indicated with a white background with black text for buttons
AND focus is assigned to the top left most team tile (Arizona Diamondbacks), on page load
AND focus moves in relation to the user's input on the controller
AND focus does not leave the first row if the user attempts to navigate up, beyond the first row
AND focus does not leave the right column if the user attempts to navigate right, beyond the right column
AND focus does not leave the last row if the user attempts to navigate down, beyond the last row
AND focus moves to the "Done"/"Next" button if the user navigates left from any tile in the left column
AND focus moves to the previously focused tile if the user navigates right from the "Done"/"Next" button
AND focus moves to the "Cancel"/"Skip" button if the user navigates left from the "Done"/"Next" button 
AND focus moves to the "Done"/"Next" button if the user navigates right from the "Cancel"/"Skip" button
AND focus does not move from the "Cancel"/"Skip" button if the user attempts to navigate further to the right
AND focus does not move from the "Cancel"/"Skip" button if the user attempts to navigate up or down
AND focus does not move from the "Done"/"Next" button if the user attempts to navigate up or down

**NOTE:** 
"Cancel" and "Done" will display in the buttons if the Following Teams page is loaded from the Settings page. 
"Skip" and "Next" will display in the buttons if the Following Teams page is loaded as part of the onboarding flow.

summary: App launch to Home page
description: GIVEN the app is in a closed state

steps.action: WHEN the user launches the app
steps.result:
THEN the Home page loads cleanly
AND fonts don't shift between different font styles

summary: Following Teams - Settings page Back
description:
GIVEN a logged in user is on the Settings page
AND the user selects "Following Teams" in the list of settings
AND the user selects a following team
OR the user does not selecta a following team

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the CIRCLE/O button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated back to the Settings page
AND focus is assigned to "Log Out" in the list of settings
AND no updates were saved to the user's following teams

summary: Game Tile Pregame Peacock
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND a Peacock game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Peacock game tile that has not gone live yet in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>, <away_team_wins> Wins, <away_team_losses> Losses at <home_team>, <home_team_wins> Wins, <home_team_losses> Losses, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Blacked Out, Watch on Peacock, Pitching for the <away_team> <away_starting_pitcher>, <away_pitcher_wins> Wins, <away_pitcher_losses> Losses, <away_pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average, Pitching for the <home_team> <home_starting_pitcher>, <home_pitcher_wins> Wins, <home_pitcher_losses> Losses, <home_pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."

summary: Game Tile Pregame Not Entitled Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND a user is not logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to a game tile that is not yet Live in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team> at <home_team>, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Not Entitled, Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."

summary: Game Tile Pregame Blacked Out
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action:
WHEN focus has been assigned to a game tile for a game that has not yet gone Live in the Games Carousel
AND the game tile has a blackout pill
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>, <away_team_wins> Wins, <away_team_losses> Losses at <home_team>, <home_team_wins> Wins, <home_team_losses> Losses, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Blacked Out, Pitching for the <away_team> <away_starting_pitcher>, <away_pitcher_wins> Wins, <away_pitcher_losses> Losses, <away_pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average, Pitching for the <home_team> <home_starting_pitcher>, <home_pitcher_wins> Wins, <home_pitcher_losses> Losses, <home_pitcher_ERA> Earned Run Average. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."

summary: TTS | Focus on Upgrade
description:
GIVEN a single team user launches the app
OR an audio only user launches the app
AND the user has TTS enabled

steps.action: WHEN a user focuses on the “Upgrade MLB.TV” button
steps.result:
THEN the app reader says “Upgrade MLB.TV,  press select to Upgrade MLB.TV  now, X of X in the menu, press right or left for more items in the menu”

NOTE: X should be based on how many buttons are visible to the user in the menu and the place that Upgrade MLB.TV  is in that order

summary: No select favorite (Skip) No select follow (Next) New account
description:
GIVEN the user does not have an MLB Account
AND the user is launching the app for the first time
AND the user selects the "Getting Started" button

steps.action:
WHEN the user does not select a favorite team
AND the user selects the "Skip" button
AND the user does not select any following teams
AND the user selects the "Next" button
AND the user creates a new account
steps.result: THEN no favorite or following teams are saved to the new account profile

summary: TTS | No Selectable Content
description:
GIVEN a user launches the app
AND the user has TTS enabled

steps.action: WHEN a user navigates in a direction that has no selectable content
steps.result:
THEN the app reads "There is no selectable content available to the <direction> of the current position”

**Examples:**
Up press on the directional pad or joystick, “There is no selectable content available above the current position”

Left press on the directional pad or joystick when focused on the “Home” button, “There is no selectable content available to the left of the current position”

Right press on the directional pad or joystick when focused on the “Settings” button, “There is no selectable content available to the right of the current position”

summary: TTS | Focus on Login button
description:
GIVEN an unauthenticated user is on the Login Page
AND the user has TTS Enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on the Login button
steps.result: THEN the app reads "Press select to Login. Press right to cancel login. Press up to update password.”

summary: Following Teams - Text
description: GIVEN a user is on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to "Following Teams"
steps.result: THEN "Select your teams you wish to follow. Chosen teams will always appear after the favorite team on the Homepage." displays on the left side of the screen, below the header (config driven)

summary: Game Tile Pregame Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to a game tile before the game is Live in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team> at <home_team>, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."

summary: Settings Page Navigation
description: GIVEN a user is on the Settings page

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates from the Settings button in the header down through all the items on the page
AND navigates back up to the Settings button in the header
steps.result: THEN focus is assigned to each item on the page

summary: TTS | Focus on SNY
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY

AND the user has TTS enabled

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action: WHEN a user focuses on the "SNY" button in the header
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<RSN Name>, press select to explore all available content, <x> of <y> in the menu, press right or left for more items in the menu."

summary: Header Navigation - Settings page
description: GIVEN a user has launched the app

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the the [Settings] button in the navigation header
steps.result:
THEN the Settings page loads
AND focus leaves the 'Settings' button in the header
AND the 'Settings' text color changes from black to white
AND the 'Settings' text becomes bold
AND all other button text in the header is not bold

steps.result:
THEN the user is successfully logged in
AND the header contains the MLB logo and text left justified
AND "Home" displays to the right of the MLB logo and text
AND "Games" displays to the right of "Home"
AND "Upgrade MLB.TV" and "Settings" is displayed right justified

steps.action:
WHEN the user moves focus to the Password entry
OR the user selects to enter a Password
OR the user complete their password entry
steps.result: THEN the app reader says "The password field is selected. Please hit select to enter the password associated with your MLB.TV account. Press or scroll up to enter your email. Press or scroll right to uncover your password. Press or scroll down to hit the login button”

summary: Startup Screen - After Log In
description:
GIVEN a user is logged in
AND the app has been closed

steps.action: WHEN the user launches the app from a closed state
steps.result:
THEN the Startup Screen doesn't display
AND the Home page displays

summary: Environment switching
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Settings page
AND the user has selected 'Dev Settings'

steps.action: WHEN a user selects different Environment Settings
steps.result:
THEN the app loads and functions as expected
AND the appropriate environment data is displayed based upon config settings

steps.action: WHEN a user selects dev
steps.result: THEN the app will reload and display the words *dev* in the {color:#bf2600}*RED*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)

steps.action: WHEN a user selects qa
steps.result: THEN the app will reload and display the words *qa* in the {color:#4c9aff}*Blue*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)

steps.action: WHEN a user selects stage
steps.result: THEN the app will reload and display the words *stage* in the {color:#ff5630}*ORANGE*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)

steps.action: WHEN the user selects mock
steps.result: THEN the app will reload and display the words *mock* in the {color:#36b37e}*GREEN*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)

steps.action: WHEN the user selects prod
steps.result: THEN the app will reload and the user will see our normal transparent *BLACK* Header. The words *prod will not be displayed* next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)

steps.result: THEN "Select your favorite team. Chosen teams will always appear first on the Homepage" displays on the left side of the screen, below the header (config driven)

description:

**NOTE:** If a "Watch" button is not present in the hero, focus will be assigned to the Home tab

steps.result:
THEN only three full tiles are displayed on the page
AND a fourth tile is peaking from the right side of the screen
AND as the user navigates focus to the right, the carousel slide to the left

WHEN the user selects the "Login" tab in the navigation header

AND selects the "Log In" button
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Settings page
AND focus is assigned to the "Log Out" button

steps.action: WHEN the user views the packages on the Paywall page

AND as the user navigates focus to the right, the tiles slide to the left

summary: Home page to Login to Home page
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Home page

WHEN the user selects the "Log In" tab in the navigation header

AND selects the "Log In" button
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Home page

summary: Welcome Page UI - Create Free Account
description: GIVEN the user is an Anonymous (a user that is not logged in)

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects "Subscribe" in the header
AND the Welcome screen is displayed
AND the [Create Free Account] button has focus
steps.result:
THEN the background is a picture of baseball bats
AND near the upper left corner of the screen the MLB logo and "MLB" are displayed
AND below the MLB logo, left justified, a title displays "Let's Play Ball" (config driven)
AND below that, the [Create Free Account] button, [Browse Subscriptions] button, [Explore Free Content] button are displayed vertically aligned and left justified
AND below the buttons, "Already have an account?" is displayed
AND below that, a "Log In" button is displayed
AND at the bottom left of the screen, "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Visit mlb.com/<device_platform> to learn more." is displayed (config driven)

summary: Have an MLB account Log In page UI
description: GIVEN the user launches the app without saved data

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [Have an MLB account?] button on the Startup screen
steps.result:
THEN the user lands on the Login page
AND the background image is related to the selected favorite team
AND all logos, text, text fields, and buttons are center justified
AND the MLB logo is displayed at the top of the screen
AND "MLB" text is displayed directly to the right of the MLB logo
AND below that, in bold text, "Log In to MLB" is displayed
AND below that, in regular text, "MLB.TV subscribers log in to access your subscription. Registered MLB users login to access the MLB.TV Free Game of the Day."
AND below that, the "Email Address" field displays with focus
AND the "Email Address" field background color is translucent white
AND the "Email Address" field contains light grey ghost text "Email Address"
AND below that, the "Password" field is displayed with light grey ghost text "Password"
AND to the right of the "Password" field, a button with an eye that has a diagonal line through it is displayed
AND below the "Password" field and eye button, a disabled [Log In] button is displayed to the left of an enabled [Cancel] button
AND below the [Log In] and [Cancel] buttons, the following text is displayed at the bottom of the screen, "Forgot your password? Please visit www.mlb.com/password"
AND below that text, the following text is displayed at the bottom of the screen, "Please visit mlb.com/tou for full Terms of Service"

summary: Subscription Package Tile - Large
description:
GIVEN the user is on the Paywall page
AND subscription packages have been returned from the Paywall Config
AND "large" is the size returned from the Paywall Config
AND at least 3 yearly and 3 monthly subscription packages are returned from the Paywall Config

steps.action: WHEN the user views the packages on the Paywall page
steps.result:
THEN only two full tiles are displayed on the page
AND a third tile is peaking from the right side of the screen
AND as the user navigates focus to the right, the tiles slide to the left

summary: Subscription Purchase Page - QR Code
description: GIVEN the user is on the purchase page for a subscription package

steps.action: WHEN the user scans the QR code on the screen with a mobile device
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the MLB Paywall on the mobile device

AND the URL contains reference to the device the QR Code is displayed on

summary: Home page to Subscribe to Home page - Anonymous User
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Home page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the navigation header
AND selects the "Browse Subscriptions" button on the Welcome page
AND selects one of the subscription package tiles on the Subscriptions page
AND selects the "Log In" button on the paywall page
AND enters an email address and password for an existing user
AND selects the "Log In" button on the Log In page

THEN the user is navigated to the Home page

**NOTE - Pages/modals that don't contain a navigation header:**
Log in, Create Account, Welcome, Subscriptions, Paywall, Feed Select modal, Secondary Feed Select modal

WHEN focus is assigned to a selectable element
AND the user presses the TRIANGLE button on the controller
steps.result:

summary: Create Free Account Success
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page

steps.action: WHEN the user scans the QR Code displayed on the screen
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Express Login flow with the 6 character Activation Code displayed
AND the user is able to successfully create a new account by following the prompts on their phone
AND the user selects the [Continue] button on the "Your account was successfully created." page
AND the user is successfully logged in on the connected device

summary: Can access dates in next season
description:
GIVEN the current date is not before July 1st
AND the user is on the Games page
AND the calendar is displayed

steps.action: WHEN a user navigates to any date in the next season
steps.result: THEN any date in the next season can be accessed

summary: Log In - unsuccessful no account
description: GIVEN a user is on the Log In page

steps.action:
WHEN a user has entered a  non-MLB account email address
AND a user enters a valid format password
AND a user selects the [Log In] button
steps.result:
THEN the user is not logged in
AND the following text displays in red below the password field, "The email address or password was incorrect. Please verify your login credentials and try again."
AND the email field has a red border
AND the password field has a red border

summary: Create Account Failure - Existing email/password combination
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page

WHEN the user enters an existing MLB.TV subscriber email address in the "Email Address" field

AND the user selects the [Create Account] button
steps.result: THEN red text above the "Email Address" field displays stating, "An error occurred, please try again. •duplicate email address"

summary: Settings page to Subscribe to Settings page - Create Account
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Settings page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the navigation header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button
AND the user scans the QR Code displayed on the screen
AND the user follows the create account prompts on their phone to successfully create a new account
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Settings page
AND focus is assigned to the "Log Out" button

summary: Startup Screen - UI
description:
GIVEN a user is launching the app for the first time
OR, for testing purposes, the tester has selected the "Clear Browser Storage" button, within the Dev Settings on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN the Startup Screen is displayed
steps.result:
THEN the MLB logo and "MLB" are displayed in the upper left corner of the screen
AND "Welcome to the official streaming app of Major League Baseball" is displayed left justified below the MLB logo
AND a button with text "Getting Started" is displayed left justified, halfway down the screen
AND the Getting Started button is white with black text to indicate it has focus
AND a button with text "Have an MLB.TV Account?" is displayed left justified below the Getting Started button
AND the background image is an MLB related image

summary: Subscription Purchase Page - Go Back
description: GIVEN the user is on the Purchase page for a subscription package

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the BACK button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated back to the Paywall page
AND focus is assigned to the first tile in the carousel

summary: Express Log In Code Update - Load Log In page
description: GIVEN the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user loads the Log In page
AND the user does not log in
AND the user navigates away from the Log In page
AND the user navigates back to the Log In page
steps.result: THEN the displayed activation code is different each time the Log In page is loaded

summary: Create Free MLB.TV account - Opt in/out emails
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page

steps.action: WHEN the user toggles the email opt-in/out check box
steps.result:
THEN the check box gains focus
AND the check box background is translucent white
AND the check box border is white
AND a check mark appears/disappears in the check box

summary: Can access dates through past two seasons
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Games page
AND the calendar is displayed

steps.action: WHEN a user selects any date in the previous two seasons
steps.result: THEN the games for the selected date display

summary: Yearly/Monthly Toggle Hidden
description: GIVEN a user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user is on the Paywall page
AND only one offer group is returned in the paywall config json
steps.result:
THEN the Yearly/Monthly toggle is not displayed
AND package tiles are displayed

summary: Buy Now Yearly Subscription UI
description: GIVEN the user is on the Subscriptions/Paywall page

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to the MLB.TV Yearly Package tile
AND the user selects the tile
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the purchase instructions page
AND the MLB logo displays at the top-left of the screen
AND the text "MLB" displays directly to the right of the MLB logo
AND below that, the white text "All Teams Yearly NOW $119.99/year" displays (this text is configurable)
AND below that, white text "To purchase an MLB.TV subscription, visit mlb.com/ps5 or scan the QR Code to get started" is displayed (this text is configurable)
AND on the right side of the screen, a QR code displays
AND below the text on the left side of the screen, a [Log In] button is displayed if a user is not already logged in
AND the [Log In] button has focus
AND at the bottom of the screen the white text "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Visit mlb.com/ps5 to learn more." (this is configurable)

summary: Cannot access games beyond past two seasons - Games page
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Games page
AND displayed date is January 2nd, two seasons ago

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [<] button
steps.result:
THEN the displayed date is January 1
AND the [<] button is grayed out
AND focus cannot be reassigned to the [<] button once focus is removed
AND the user cannot access dates further back than the previous two seasons

summary: Header navigation - Free user
description:
GIVEN a free user is logged in
AND one of the tabs in the header has focus

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates left and right in the header
steps.result:
THEN focus moves from "Home" to "Games" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Games" to "Get MLB.tv" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Upgrade MLB.TV" to "Games" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Upgrade MLB.TV" to "Settings" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Settings" to "Upgrade MLB.TV" and vice versa

summary: Settings page to Subscribe to Settings page - Anonymous User
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Settings page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the navigation header
AND selects the "Browse Subscriptions" button on the Welcome page
AND selects one of the subscription package tiles on the Subscriptions page
AND selects the "Log In" button on the paywall page
AND enters an email address and password for an existing user
AND selects the "Log In" button on the Log In page
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Settings page
AND focus is assigned to the "Log Out" button

summary: Create Account page UI
description:
GIVEN the user is Anonymous (not logged in)
AND the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the header

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page
steps.result:
THEN the user lands on the Create Account page
AND the background is a picture of baseball bats
AND all the elements of the page are left justified on the screen
AND the MLB logo displays in the upper left of the screen
AND the text "MLB" displays directly to the right of the MLB logo
AND below that, the title displays "Create a free MLB account" (config driven)
AND below the title, the subtitle displays "Create your MLB account today to watch free content and much, much more." (config driven)
AND at the bottom of the screen the white text "By watching Free Game of the Day I agreeto receive limited follow-up emails about MLB subscriptions." (config driven)

summary: Header navigation - Upgrade Plan
description: GIVEN a Free user launches the app to explore free content

steps.action: WHEN the user selects "Upgrade Plan" in the header
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Subscriptions page
AND pressing the "back" button on the remote controller will navigate the user to the previous page

summary: Create Account Failure - Invalid Email
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page

steps.action:
WHEN the user enters an invalid format email address in the "Email Address" field
AND a valid format password in the "Password" field
AND selects the [Create Account] button
steps.result:
THEN the email address field has a red border
AND "Your e-mail address must be in the format of name@domain.com." is displayed between the email address field and password field

summary: Cannot access games beyond past two seasons - Calendar
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Games page
AND the calendar is displayed

steps.action:
WHEN a user navigates to any date in the past beyond the previous two seasons

WHEN the user selects the [<] button
AND the user continues selecting [<] until January from two seasons ago is reached
steps.result:
THEN the [<] button is grayed out
AND once focus leaves the grayed out button, focus cannot be reassigned while displaying January
AND the user cannot access games further back than the past two seasons

summary: Explore Free Content flow
description:
GIVEN the user launches the app without saved data
AND selects the [Get Started] button on the Startup screen
AND selects a favorite team on the Favorite Team page
AND selects the [Next] button on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [Explore Free Content] button
steps.result:
THEN the user lands on Home page
AND the logo of the selected favorite team displays directly left of "Settings" in the upper right corner of the screen

summary: Buy Now Monthly Subscription flow
description: GIVEN the user is on the Subscriptions/Paywall page

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to the MLB.TV Monthly Package tile
AND the user selects the [Buy Now] button on the Subscriptions/Paywall page
AND the user selects the [Log In] button on the Purchase Instructions page
steps.result: THEN the user is navigated to the Log In page

summary: Log In - Log In button enabled
description:
GIVEN a user launches the app
AND a user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a user navigates to the Log In page
AND a user enters a valid format email address in the "Email Address" field
AND a user enters one character in the "Password" field
steps.result: THEN the [Log In] button is enabled

summary: Buy Now Single Team Subscription UI
description: GIVEN the user is on the Subscriptions/Paywall page

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to the MLB.TV Single Team Package tile
AND the user selects the [Buy Now] button
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the purchase instructions page
AND the MLB logo displays at the top of the screen
AND the text "MLB" displays directly to the right of the MLB logo
AND the MLB logo with the "MLB" text is centered at the top of the screen
AND below that, the white text "Purchase an MLB.TV subscription to watch games LIVE or on demand." displays (this text is configurable)
AND below that, white text "MLB.TV Single team <price>" is displayed to the right of a check mark inside a translucent grey box
AND below that, diagonally left, a number list of instructions displays the following, "1. Visit mlb.com/ps5", "2. Select a package", "3. Log In or create an account", "4. Complete your purchase", "5. Return to your TV and log in" (text is configurable)
AND to the right of the list of instructions, a QR code displays
AND below the QR code the following white text displays "Scan to visit mlb.com/ps5" (text is configurable)
AND below the list of instructions and QR code a [Log In] button is displayed
AND the [Log In] button has focus
AND at the bottom of the screen the white text "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Visit mlb.com/ps5 to learn more."

summary: Paywall Subscription Package Carousel
description: GIVEN a user is on the Paywall/Subscriptions page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates through the subscription package carousel
steps.result:
THEN focus is indicated by a white border around the package tile
AND if more than 3 subscription packages are returned from the service, the carousel scrolls to the left to focus on tiles 4 and above
AND as the carousel scrolls, the package tiles peek from either side of the screen
AND focus does not leave the carousel when the user attempts to navigate down

summary: Subscription Purchase Page - Log In Anonymous
description: GIVEN the user is on the Purchase page for a subscription package

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the "Log In" button
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Log In page
AND the user is able to successfully log in

summary: Header navigation - Subscribe
description: GIVEN an anonymous user launches the app to explore free content

steps.action: WHEN the user selects "Subscribe" in the header
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Welcome page
AND pressing the "back" button on the remote controller will navigate the user to the previous page

summary: Log In from header - Cancel button functionality
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the Log In tab in the header

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the [Cancel] button
steps.result: THEN the user is navigated to the previous page

summary: Log In from settings - Cancel button functionality
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user navigates to the Settings page
AND the user selects the Log In on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the [Cancel] button
steps.result: THEN the user is navigated to the Settings page

summary: Create Free Account page navigation
description: GIVEN an anonymous user has launched the MLB app

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Subscribe" button in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button
steps.result:
THEN the Create Account page is displayed
AND the user does not have any on page navigation options
AND the "back" button should navigate the user to the previous page

summary: Welcome Page UI - Browse Subscriptions
description: GIVEN the user is an Anonymous (a user that is not logged in)

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects "Get MLB.TV" in the header
AND the Welcome screen is displayed
AND the [Browse Subscriptions] button has focus
steps.result:
THEN the background is a picture of stadium seats at the ballpark
AND near the upper left corner of the screen the MLB logo and "MLB" are displayed
AND below the MLB logo, left justified, a title displays "Let's Play Ball" (config driven)
AND below the title, left justified, a description displays "Choose how you'd like to explore MLB.TV today" (config driven)
AND below that, the [Create Free Account] button, [Browse Subscriptions] button, [Explore Free Content] button are displayed vertically aligned and left justified
AND below the buttons, "Already have an account?" is displayed
AND below that, a "Log In" button is displayed
AND at the bottom left of the screen, "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Visit mlb.com/ps5 to learn more." is displayed (config driven)

summary: Subscription Purchase Page - Log In non-Anonymous
description: GIVEN the user is an AtBat, Single Team, or Free subscriber

steps.action: WHEN the user is on the Purchase page for a subscription package
steps.result: THEN the "Log In" button does not display

summary: Create Account - hide password
description:
GIVEN the user is on the Create Account page
AND the eye button has a slash through it
AND characters have been entered into the Password field

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the eye button
steps.result:
THEN the characters entered in the Password field are changed to dots (•)
AND the eye button does not display a slash through the eye

summary: Header navigation - EXEC user
description:
GIVEN a user with MLBEXEC entitlement is logged in
AND one of the tabs in the header has focus

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates left and right in the header
steps.result:
THEN focus moves from "Home" to "MASN" and vice versa

AND focus moves from "MASN" to "MASN2" and vice versa

AND focus moves from "MASN2" to "SNLA+" and vice versa

AND focus moves from "SNLA+" to "SNY" and vice versa

AND focus moves from "SNY" to "Games" and vice versa

AND focus moves from "Games" to "Settings" and vice versa

summary: Create Account Failure - Invalid Password - Bad Format
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page

steps.action:
WHEN the user enters a valid format email address in the "Email Address" field
AND the user enters a valid password length with only lower-case letters in the "Password" field
OR the user enters a valid password length with only upper-case letters in the "Password" field
OR the user enters a valid password length with only numbers in the "Password" field
OR the user enters a valid password length with only lower-case letters and a number in the "Password" field
OR the user enters a valid password length with only upper-case letters and a number in the "Password" field
AND the user selects the [Create Account] button
steps.result: THEN "Use 8-15 characters with one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number." displays directly below the password field

summary: Browse Subscriptions page UI
description: GIVEN the user is on the Get MLB.TV/Welcome page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [Browse Subscriptions] button on the Welcome page
steps.result:
THEN the user lands on the Subscriptions/Paywall page
AND the background is a generic baseball image
AND all the elements of the page are Left justified on the screen
AND the MLB logo displays at the top of the screen
AND the text "MLB" displays directly to the right of the MLB logo
AND below that, the white text "Choose your plan" displays (config driven)
AND below that, the white text "Stream MLB action, minor league games, and exclusive content" displays (config driven)
AND below that, a Yearly/Monthly toggle displays
AND below that, the available package tiles display in a carousel
AND no more than 3 package tiles are fully displayed in the carousel
IF more than 3 packages are returned from the service, the 4th package tile is peeking from the right side of the screen
AND the text "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Visit mlb.com/{platform} to learn more." displays left justified at the bottom of the screen (config driven)

**NOTE:** The displayed subscriptions are driven by the paywall config tool. It is possible to have less than three subscription options displaying. The contents of the tiles are also subject to the paywall config tool and may be different than what is mentioned in the test. The displayed subscription options will be left justified.

summary: Header navigation - Single Team user
description:
GIVEN a Single Team subscriber is logged in
AND one of the tabs in the header has focus

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates left and right in the header
steps.result:
THEN focus moves from "Home" to "Games" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Games" to "Get MLB.tv" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Upgrade MLB.TV" to "Games" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Upgrade MLB.TV" to "Settings" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Settings" to "Upgrade MLB.TV" and vice versa

summary: Explore Free Content to Games page
description:
GIVEN the user is not a paid subscriber
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the navigation header
AND selects the "Explore Free Content" button on the Onboarding page
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Games page
AND focus is assigned to the top furthest left game tile

summary: User stays logged in
description: GIVEN a user is logged into the app

steps.action:
WHEN a user closes the app
OR the user puts the app to sleep
AND the user relaunches the app
steps.result: THEN the user should still be logged in

summary: Games page to Subscribe to Games page - Create Account
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Subscribe" tab in the navigation header
AND the user selects the [Create Account] button
AND the user scans the QR Code displayed on the screen
AND the user follows the create account prompts on their phone to successfully create a new account
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Games page
AND focus is assigned to the furthest left game tile on the first row

summary: Create Account Failure - Invalid Password - Length
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND the user selects the "Get MLB.TV" tab in the header
AND the user selects the [Create Free Account] button on the Welcome page

steps.action:
WHEN the user enters a valid format email address in the "Email Address" field
AND the user enters an invalid password length in the "Password" field
AND selects the [Create Account] button
steps.result:
THEN the password field has a red border
AND "Use 8-15 characters with one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number." displays directly below the password field

summary: Games page to Login to Games page
description: GIVEN an anonymous user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Log In" tab in the navigation header

AND selects the "Log In" button
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the Games page
AND focus is assigned to the "<" button above the furthest right game tile

summary: Log In - Successful login free user
description: GIVEN the user is on the Log In page

steps.action:
WHEN a user enters an existing free MLB account email address in the "Email Address" field
AND a user enters a valid password in the "Password" field
AND a user selects the [Log In] button
steps.result:
THEN the user is logged in successfully
AND a spinning baseball is displayed indicating the page is loading
AND the user is navigated to the previous page

summary: Log In - invalid password format
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Log In page
AND a user has entered an MLB account email address

steps.action:
WHEN a user enters an invalid format password (lower case letters only)
AND a user selects the [Log In] button
steps.result:
THEN the user is not logged in
AND the following text displays in red below the password field, "The email address or password was incorrect. Please verify your login credentials and try again."
AND the email field has a red border
AND the password field has a red border

summary: Header navigation - MLBALL user
description:
GIVEN a subscriber with MLBALL entitlement is logged in
AND one of the tabs in the header has focus

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates left and right in the header
steps.result:
THEN focus moves from "Home" to "Games" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Games" to "Settings" and vice versa
AND focus moves from "Settings" to "Games" and vice versa

summary: Yearly/Monthly Toggle
description:
GIVEN at least 1 yearly subscription package is set up in the Paywall Config tool
AND at lease 1 monthly subscription package is set up in the Paywall Config tool
AND the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to the "Welcome" page by clicking "Get MLB.TV" in the header
AND the user selects the "Browse Subscriptions" button
steps.result:
THEN a Yearly/Monthly toggle is displayed left justified above the left most tile
AND Yearly is displayed with a light gray button/pill background color
AND Monthly is displayed with a dark gray button/pill background color
AND focus is assigned to the left most tile
AND only Yearly packages are displayed
AND after toggling from Yearly to Monthly, only Monthly packages are displayed

summary: Subscription Package Tile - UI
description:
GIVEN the user is on the Paywall page
AND subscription packages have been returned from the Paywall Config

steps.action: WHEN the user views a subscription package tile
steps.result:
THEN the name of the SKU will be left justified at the top of the tile (an ellipse will display at the end of the SKU name if it's longer than 1 line)
AND "Free for 7 days, then <price> / <period>" is displayed below the name of the SKU (config driven)
AND a description of the SKU will appear at the bottom of the tile
AND if badging for the package is returned in the service, it will appear at the top of the tile with center justified text

**NOTE:** Badging color and text will be returned in the service

summary: Subscription Purchase Page - UI
description: GIVEN a user is on the Paywall page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a subscription package tile
steps.result:
THEN the user is navigated to the purchase page for the selected package
AND the MLB log displays in the upper left corner of the screen
AND the selected package title displays in white text, left justified below the MLB logo
AND "<price>/<period>" displays in white text below the package title
AND the subtitle text reads "To purchase an MLB.TV subscription, visit mlb.com/ps5 or scan the QR Code to get started" in white text (config driven)
AND a button with text "Log In" is displayed below the subtitle
AND the log in button is white with black text, to indicate focus
AND a QR code is displayed on the right side of the screen

summary: Header navigation - T-Mobile user
description:

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates left and right in the header
steps.result:

AND focus moves from "Settings" to "Games" and vice versa

summary: Log In - Activation Code Success

summary: Log In - QR Code Failure

steps.action:

summary: Success Log In From Header Navigation
description:

AND selects the [Next] button on the Favorite Team page
AND the user selects the [Explore Free Content] button on the Welcome page

steps.action:
WHEN the user lands on the Home page
AND the user selects the [Log In] button in the top navigation bar

description:

AND below that, the "Email Address" field displays with focus
AND the "Email Address" field contains grey ghost text "Email Address"
AND below that, the "Password" field is displayed with grey ghost text "Password"
AND to the right of the "Password" field, a button with an eye icon is displayed
AND below the "Password" field and view password button, a disabled [Sign In] button is displayed to the left of an enabled [Cancel] button
AND below the [Log In] and [Cancel] buttons, the following text is displayed at the bottom of the screen, "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Please visit mlb.com/ps5 to learn more."
AND to the right of the text fields and buttons, two white vertical lines are displayed with "OR" separating them
AND to the right of the "OR" and vertical lines, "Express Sign In" is displayed as a title

AND a QR code followed by an eight digit code is displayed below "Scan the QR code or go to mlb.com/activate and enter the code."
AND the footer displays "Blackout and other restrictions apply. Visit mlb.com/<platform> to learn more."

summary: Live Game - Unfocused Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND the selected date has in-progress/live games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND an in-progress/live game tile does not have focus
steps.result:
THEN the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the current score displays between the away and home team logos
AND a "LIVE" pill indicator is displayed left justified below the match up header
AND the current inning status is displayed to the right of the Live pill indicator
AND the current pitcher displays "P <team_tri_code> <pitcher_name>" left justified below the Live indicator
AND the current batter displays "AB <team_tri_code> <batter_name>" left justified below the current pitcher
AND the bases/outs indicator display right-center justified in the non-match up portion of the game tile
AND the base indicators reflect the current base runners in the current inning
AND the out indicators reflect the current outs of the inning
AND any applicable pills display left justified at the bottom of the game tile

summary: Scheduled Game - Unfocused Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND games are scheduled to happen today

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a scheduled game tile does not have focus
steps.result:
THEN the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the scheduled game time displays left-justified below the match-up header
AND below the scheduled game time, the pitching match-up displays with the away pitcher above the home pitcher
AND the away team tri-code displays to the left of the away pitcher's name
AND the home team tri-code displays to the left of the home pitcher's name
AND to the right of the pitcher match-up, gray base icons display above gray outs icons
*************FEATURES BELOW ARE NOT IMPLEMENTED*************
AND below the pitcher match-up, call letters for the available live feeds are displayed

AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game has completed
AND more than 9 innings were played

**NOTES:**
epgv3 key values
"abstractGameState": "Final",
"codedGameState": "F",
"detailedState": "Final",
"statusCode": "F",
"startTimeTBD": false,
"abstractGameCode": "F",
"currentInning": 11,
steps.result: THEN 'FINAL' is displayed in white text left justified below the match-up header

summary: Final Game state 'FORFEIT' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: Q,QK,QX,QQ,QJ,QI,QN,QV,QR,QO,R,RR,RK,RX,RQ,RJ,RI,RN,RV,RO
steps.result:
THEN 
**PENDING PS5TV-340**

steps.action: WHEN a live game has any of the following statusCode values: IR,IS,IG,IF,IC,ID,IB,IL,II

steps.action: WHEN a scheduled game has any of the following statusCode values: PV,PP,PY,PE,PA,PO

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.result:

AND three gray circle out indicators are displayed below the base indicators
AND the base/out indicators are center-right justified in the non-matchup portion of the game tile

summary: Live Game - Unfocused Game Tile Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND the selected date has in-progress/live games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND an in-progress/live game tile does not have focus
steps.result:
THEN the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND a "LIVE" pill indicator is displayed left justified below the match-up header

AND the current batter displays as "Batter Hidden" left justified below the current pitcher
AND the bases/outs indicators do not display
AND any applicable pills display left justified at the bottom of the game tile

summary: Preview/Scheduled Game state 'DELAYED'
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a scheduled game has any of the following statusCode values: PV,PP,PY,PE,PA,PO
steps.result: THEN 'DELAYED' is displayed as a badge in the top left corner of the game tile

summary: Final Game state 'POSTPONED'
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: DR,DS,DG,DV,DF,DC,DD,DB,DP,Dl,DE,DA,DO,DI
steps.result: THEN 'POSTPONED' is displayed in the top left corner of the game tile

summary: Scheduled Game Focused
description:
GIVEN a game is in a scheduled state
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to a game tile for a scheduled game
steps.result:
THEN the tile background is white
AND the text is black (team records, player position and stats, and "Broadcast Networks" will be in gray text)
AND the game start time is displayed in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND the away team logo with team name displays left justified below the displayed scheduled game time
AND the home team logo with team name displays left justified below the away team
AND the team records are displayed right justified in-line with the respective teams
AND the away probable pitcher's headshot with last name is displayed left justified below "STARTING PITCHERS"
AND the home probable pitcher's headshot with last name is displayed to the right of the away team probable pitcher
AND the stats of the respective probable pitchers is displayed

NOTE:

# If probable pitchers are not yet available for the game, then show a generic headshot, dashes '-' for stats, and TBD in place of pitchers name

summary: Completed Game W/L/S - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a game has been completed
AND the game state is Final
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN the user views a game tile for a completed game
steps.result:
THEN the winning pitcher headshot and last name displays left justified below "PITCHING RESULTS"
AND "WIN" is displayed in green text
AND the losing pitcher headshot and last name displays center justified below "PITCHING RESULTS"
AND "LOSS" is displayed in red text
AND the saving pitcher headshot and last name displays right justified below "PITCHING RESULTS"
AND "SAVE" is displayed in green text

summary: Select day with games
description:
GIVEN a user has launched the app
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user select the [calendar] button
AND the user selects a date that has games
steps.result:
THEN a loading screen with a spinning baseball image displays
AND the user is navigated back to the Games page
AND the number of game tiles that are displaying is the same number of games on the selected day from the calendar
AND the selected date is displayed in the upper left corner of the screen below the navigation header

summary: Game Tile Order
description: GIVEN a user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects the [calendar] button
AND selects a day with games
steps.result:
THEN the number of game tiles is the same as was selected on the calendar
AND there are 4 tiles per row
AND games should be ordered by favorite team, following teams, live games with more progress to live games with less progress, games that have not started by nearest start time to latest start time, completed games, cancelled/postponed

summary: Game Tile Focus State

AND the focused game tile is larger than non-focused game tiles

summary: Jump to navigation header on Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to the bottom of the Games page
AND the user presses the [triangle] button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the [Games] button in the navigation header at the top of the screen gains focus
AND the page scrolls to the top
AND the user stays on the Games page

summary: Final Game state - Extra Innings
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action:
WHEN a game has completed
AND more than 9 innings were played

**NOTES:**
epgv3 key values
"abstractGameState": "Final",
"codedGameState": "F",
"detailedState": "Final",
"statusCode": "F",
"startTimeTBD": false,
"abstractGameCode": "F",
"currentInning": 11,
steps.result: THEN 'FINAL/<inning #>' is displayed in white text left justified below the match-up header

summary: Preview - Time

steps.action: WHEN a user views game tiles for a scheduled game with a start time
steps.result:
THEN the game start time is displayed in white text left justified below the game tile header
AND the time displays in the users time zone

summary: Final Game state 'POSTPONED' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: DR,DS,DG,DV,DF,DC,DD,DB,DP,Dl,DE,DA,DO,DI
steps.result: THEN 'POSTPONED' is not displayed in the game tile

summary: Live Game - Focused Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND the selected date has in-progress/live games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND an in-progress/live game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the away team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the current score displays between the away and home team logos
AND a "LIVE" pill indicator is displayed left justified below the match-up header
AND the current inning status is displayed to the right of the Live pill indicator
AND the current pitcher headshot with the primary team color as the background is displayed left justified below the Live indicator
AND the current pitcher name is displayed to the right of their headshot
AND the current pitcher's innings pitched in the game followed by their season ERA are displayed to the right of their headshot, below their name
AND the current batter headshot with the primary team color as the background is displayed left justified below the current pitcher headshot
AND the current batter's name is displayed to the right of their headshot
AND the current batter's game at-bat's followed by their season batting average are displayed to the right of their headshot, below their name
AND the bases/outs indicators display right-center justified in the non-matchup portion of the game tile
AND the bases indicator reflect the current base runners
AND the outs indicator reflect the current inning outs
AND any applicable pills display left justified at the bottom of the game tile

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to the game tile

THEN the winning pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background left justified below the "FINAL" game state
AND W <winning_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "W <winning_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of innings pitched
AND the losing pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background left justified below the winning pitcher headshot
AND L <losing_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
