AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the scheduled game time displays left-justified below the match-up header in the game tile
AND below the scheduled game time, the pitching match-up displays "Probable Pitcher Hidden" for the away and home probable pitchers
*******BELOW FEATURES HAVE NOT BEEN IMPLEMENTED YET*******
AND below the pitcher match-up, call letters for the available live feeds are displayed

summary: Today's Games Scheduled Start Times - User's Time Zone
description:
GIVEN games are scheduled for today
AND the PlayStation time zone is set to the users current location

steps.action: WHEN the user is on the Games page for today
steps.result: THEN the game tiles show the scheduled start times in the device time zone (format: hh:mm [AM|PM])

summary: Bottom Inning
description: GIVEN a user is entitled to watch a live game

steps.action:
WHEN a user plays in-progress live game
AND the game is in the top of an inning
steps.result: THEN "BOT <inning#>" displays in white text directly to the right of the Live pill indicator under the game tile header

summary: Unable to load Schedule data - Retry Failure
description:
GIVEN the mastapi request is blocked
AND the MLB app is open
AND the 'unable to load games' error screen is displayed

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the [Okay] button 3x
steps.result:
THEN an error screen displays
AND the MLB logo and MLB text are displayed top center of the screen
AND a message stating a critical error has occurred 
AND a [Reset] button is displayed with focus below the message

summary: Unable to load Schedule data
description:
GIVEN the mastAPI or statsAPI request is blocked
AND the MLB app is open

**NOTE:** network requests URLs to block
statsAPI - *statsapi.mlb.com
mastAPI - *mlbinfra.com

steps.action: WHEN a user tries to load the Games page
steps.result:
THEN an error screen displays
AND the MLB logo and MLB text are displayed top center of the screen
AND a message stating game data could not be loaded
AND an [Okay] button is displayed with focus below the message

summary: Final Game state 'CANCELLED' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: CR,CS,CG,CV,CF,CC,CD,CB,CP,CL,CE,CA,CO,CI
steps.result: THEN 'CANCELLED' is not displayed in the game tile

summary: Select date in the past
description:
GIVEN a user has launched the app
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user select the [calendar] button
AND the user navigates to the previous month with games
AND the user selects a date with games
steps.result:
THEN the calendar is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the Games page
AND a spinning baseball displays while the page loads
AND games for the selected date are displayed
AND the selected date is displayed in the upper left corner of the screen below the navigation header

summary: Calendar UI
description:
GIVEN a user has launched the app
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [calendar] button
steps.result:
THEN the calendar for the current month is displayed
AND the games page date is highlighted white
AND each date displays its total number of games for that date in black text
AND the days of the week are 3-letter abbreviations
AND the month with year is left justified at the top of the page
AND the correct number of days is displayed for the given month
AND the previous month [<-] button displays to the right of the month/year
AND the next month [->] button displays to the right of the [<-] button
AND the [Today] button displays to the right of the [->] button
AND the background is black
AND the week starts with Sunday
AND the day numbers are in the upper left corner of the day tiles in gray text

summary: Today button navigates to today's date
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Games page
AND the displayed date/day of games is not today

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the [Today] button
steps.result:
THEN the [Today] button is dismissed
AND the date in the upper left of the screen updates to "Today, [todays date]"
AND the games for today's date are displayed

summary: Final Game state 'CANCELLED'
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: CR,CS,CG,CV,CF,CC,CD,CB,CP,CL,CE,CA,CO,CI
steps.result: THEN 'CANCELLED' is displayed in the top left corner of the game tile

summary: Unable to load Schedule data - Retry Success
description:
GIVEN the MLB app is open
AND the 'unable to load games' error screen is displayed
AND the mastapi request is not blocked

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the [Okay] button
steps.result:
THEN the error screen is dismissed
AND a black screen with a spinning baseball is displayed
AND the user is navigated to the previous page
AND the games scheduled for today are displayed
AND if navigated to the Home page, focus is assigned to the Watch button in the Hero
OR focus is assigned to the Home tab if the Watch button is not in the Hero
AND if navigated to the Games page, focus is assigned to the left most game tile in the top row

summary: Scheduled Game - Focused Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND the selected date has scheduled games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a scheduled game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the away team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the scheduled game time displays left-justified below the game tile header
AND below the scheduled game time, the pitching match-up displays with the away pitcher above the home pitcher
AND a headshot of the away pitcher displays
AND to the right of the headshot, the team tri-code, the pitcher's name, win-loss record, and ERA are displayed
AND a headshot of the home pitcher displays
AND to the right of the headshot, the team tri-code, the pitcher's name, win-loss record, and ERA are displayed
AND to the right of the pitcher match-up, gray base icons display above  gray outs icons
*******BELOW FEATURES HAVE NOT BEEN IMPLEMENTED YET*******
AND below the pitcher match-up, call letters for the available live feeds are displayed

summary: Final/Completed Game - Unfocused Game Tile Data Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND the selected date has completed games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a completed game tile does not have focus
steps.result:
THEN the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the final score does not display between the away and home team logos
AND "FINAL" is displayed in white text left justified below the game tile header
AND "Hide Spoilers ON" displays in white text centered in the non-matchup portion of the game tile
AND any applicable pills are displayed left justified at the bottom of the game tile

summary: Completed Game Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a game is in a final/completed state
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN a user views a game tile for a completed game
steps.result:
THEN the teams are displayed away team above home team with team avitars
AND Broadcast Networks are displayed
AND player information is not displayed
AND the final score is not displayed
AND the team records are not displayed

summary: Live Game - Focused Game Tile Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND the selected date has in-progress/live games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND an in-progress/live game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND a "LIVE" pill indicator is displayed left justified below the match-up header
AND the current pitcher displays as "Pitcher Hidden" left justified below the Live indicator
AND the current batter displays as "Batter Hidden" left justified below the current pitcher
AND the bases/outs indicators do not display
AND any applicable pills display left justified at the bottom of the game tile

summary: Live Game Focused
description:
GIVEN a game is live/in-progress
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a user views a game tile in a focused state
steps.result:
THEN the tile background is white
AND the text is black (player position and stats, and "Broadcast Networks" will be in gray text)
AND a red "LIVE" badge is displayed in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND the inning, base runners paw print, batter count, number of outs is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the away team logo with team name displays left justified below the "LIVE" badge
AND the home team logo with team name displays left justified below the away team
AND the team runs scored are displayed right justified in-line with the respective teams
AND the current batter headshot with last name, position, and stats is displayed left justified below "CURRENT AT BAT"
AND the current pitcher's headshot with last name, position, and stats is displayed to the right of the current batter
AND the available "Broadcast Networks" displays below the batter/pitcher matchup

summary: Completed Game W/L/S Focused
description:
GIVEN a game has been completed
AND the game state is Final
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to the game tile
steps.result:
THEN the winning pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background left justified below the "FINAL" game state
AND W <winning_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "W <winning_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND the losing pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background left justified below the winning pitcher headshot
AND L <losing_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "L <losing_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND (if a game has a saving pitcher) the saving pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background left justified below the losing pitcher headshot
AND S <saving_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed to the right of the saving pitcher name
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched

NOTES: 
1. A silhouette image will display if a player headshot is not available
2. If pitcher data is not available, "-" will display in its place
3. Any partner tags will be hidden when there is a saving pitcher and the Game Tile is focused

summary: Live Game state 'SUSPENDED' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a live game has any of the following statusCode values: T,TR,TS,TG,TV,TF,TC,TD,TB,TP,TL,TE,TA,TO,TI,TU,UR,US,UG,UV,UF,UC,UD,UP,UL,UE,UA,UO,U,UZ,UI,UU
steps.result: THEN 'SUSPENDED' is not displayed in the match-up header of the game tile

summary: Pregame show
description: GIVEN a game is streaming a Pregame Show

steps.action: WHEN a user views game tiles for a game in a pregame/scheduled state
steps.result: THEN "PREGAME SHOWS" is displayed directly to the right of the game time badge

summary: Final/Completed Game - Focused Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND the selected date has completed games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a completed game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the away team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the final score displays between the away and home team logos
AND "FINAL" is displayed in white text left justified below the match up header
AND the winning pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background, left justified below "FINAL"
AND W <winning_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "W <winning_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND the losing pitcher headshot is displayed below the winning pitcher's headshot with the team primary color as a circular background
AND L <losing_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of player headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "L <losing_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND (if a game has a saving pitcher) the saving pitcher headshot is displayed with the team primary color as a circular background below the losing pitcher headshot
AND S <saving_pitcher_name> is displayed to the right of saving pitcher headshot
AND Innings pitched is displayed below "S <saving_pitcher_name>"
AND ERA is displayed to the right of the innings pitched
AND the bases/outs indicator is displayed right-center justified in the non-match up portion of the game tile
AND the base/out indicators are gray in color

NOTES: 
1. A silhouette image will display if a player headshot is not available
2. If pitcher data is not available, "-" will display in its place
3. Any partner tags will be hidden when there is a saving pitcher and the Game Tile is focused

summary: Free subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is archived

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is a dark overlay of the team match up

summary: Live Game state 'SUSPENDED'
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN a live game has any of the following statusCode values: T,TR,TS,TG,TV,TF,TC,TD,TB,TP,TL,TE,TA,TO,TI,TU,UR,US,UG,UV,UF,UC,UD,UP,UL,UE,UA,UO,U,UZ,UI,UU
steps.result: THEN 'SUSPENDED' is displayed top-center in the match-up header of the game tile

summary: Scheduled Game Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a scheduled game has probable pitchers assigned
AND Hide Spoilers is ON

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN a user views a scheduled game tile
steps.result:
THEN the scheduled game time is displayed in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND the team match up displays away team above home team
AND the team logos display to the left of the respective team name
AND probable pitcher information is not displayed
AND Broadcast Networks are displayed below the team match up

NOTE: If the tile has focus, the background will be white with black text. If the tile does not have focus, the background will be a dark gray with white text. "Broadcast Networks" will always be in gray text.

summary: Navigate through past days
description:
GIVEN a user has launched the app
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user select the next day [<-] button
AND the user navigates 8 days into the past
steps.result:
THEN a loading screen with a spinning baseball image displays for every date navigated to
AND the Games page updates to display the games for each day that is navigated to
AND a [Today] button appears to the left of the [<-] button

summary: Games Page updates after games player is dismissed
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for game playback
AND a user is on the Games page
AND a user has initiated playback of an in progress game
AND the continues playback for a few innings

steps.action: WHEN the user dismisses playback
steps.result:
THEN the video player is dismissed
AND the user is brought back to the Games page
AND the Games page updates to display the most up to date game info

summary: Games page UI - Date is today
description: GIVEN the MLB app is launched

steps.action: WHEN a user navigates to the Games page
steps.result:
THEN "Today, [todays date]" is displayed above and to the left of the game tiles
AND a calendar button/icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the page
AND arrow buttons [<][>] display directly to the left of the calendar button/icon
AND the number of game tiles that are displaying is the same as total number of games for the day

Update the startDate and endDate in below url to get total number of games for the date range
https://qa-statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1/schedule?startDate=08/19/2022&endDate=08/19/2022&fields=dates,date,totalGames&sportId=1

summary: Extra Innings subscriber AppleTV+ archive - Game Tile
description: GIVEN a user is an XtraInnings subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND the AppleTV+ pill does not display in the game tile

summary: Free subscriber AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user views the AppleTV+ game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN the AppleTV+ pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay

summary: AtBat subscriber AppleTV+ archive - Feed Select modal
description: GIVEN a user is an Audio Only subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the AppleTV+ feed button with a lock icon
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user cannot playback the AppleTV+ feed
AND the user is taken to the Subscriptions page after selecting the feed button

summary: AtBat subscriber - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is an audio only subscriber
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledAudio equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action:
WHEN a user views/focuses an out-of-market scheduled/in-progress game tile
OR a user views/focuses an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game tile header has a dark overlay over the team colors

summary: T-Mobile subscriber Peacock archive - Game Tile
description: GIVEN a user is a T-Mobile subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive Peacock game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND the Peacock pill does not display in the game tile

summary: Single Team subscriber out of market non-subscribed team - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND a game includes the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the feed level entitled equals true for the subscribed-to-team
AND the feed level entitled equals false for the non-subscribed-to-team

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a game tile for an in-progress game of the subscribed-to-team
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays on the feed button for the not entitled team
AND the user is able to play the feed of the subscribed-to-team
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page after clicking the feed button for the non-subscrined-to-team
AND the user is navigated back to the selected game tile after pressing the "back" button on the controller

summary: MLBN MVPD - Canada
description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND MLBN broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in Canada
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the game level blackedOutVideo = true
AND the AWAY (National) feed level mlbnAuthRequired = true
AND the HOME (International) feed level mlbnAuthRequired = false

steps.action: WHEN the user views a MLBN Postseason game tile
steps.result:
THEN the MVPD pill does not display in the lower left corner of the game tile
AND the Blackout pill displays in the lower left corner of the game tile

summary: ESPN MVPD - Canada
description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND ESPN broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in Canada
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the game level blackedOutVideo = true
AND the AWAY (National) feed level espnAuthRequired = true
AND the HOME (International) feed level espnAuthRequired = false

steps.action: WHEN the user views a ESPN Postseason game tile
steps.result:
THEN the MVPD pill does not display in the lower left corner of the game tile
AND the Blackout pill displays in the lower left corner of the game tile

summary: FOX MVPD Required Pill - Unauthorized
description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
OR an All-Star Game is on the schedule
AND FOX broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is unauthorized for FOX MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = false
AND the feed level foxAuthRequired = true

steps.action:
WHEN the user views a FOX Postseason game tile
OR the user views a FOX All-Star Game tile
steps.result: THEN the MVPD pill displays in the lower left corner of the game tile

summary: Free subscriber AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a message displays letting the user know where the game can be watched

**AppleTV+ message:**
Watch on Apple TV+
This broadcast is available to watch only on Apple TV+. Open the Apple TV app to watch now or download for your streaming device. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game. Live audio is available on MLB.TV. For more information visit http://mlb.tv/appletvplus

summary: Free subscriber AppleTV+ archive - Feed Select modal
description: GIVEN a user is a Free subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive AppleTV+ game tile

AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user cannot playback the AppleTV+ feed
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions page after selecting the feed button

description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber

summary: Anonymous user Free Game of the Day archive - Feed Select
description: GIVEN a user is anonymous

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the game tile for an archived Free Game of the Day
steps.result:
THEN the following title text is displayed, "Free Game of the Day" (subject to change via Content Restrictions)

AND a user is unauthorized for MLBN MVPD

steps.action: WHEN the user views a MLBN Postseason game tile

description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND FS1 broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is unauthorized for FS1 MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = false
AND the feed level fs1AuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the user views a FS1 Postseason game tile

summary: Free subscriber out of market game - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
AND a scheduled/in-progress game is outside the users viewing market

summary: Scrubber UI - Live Games
description: GIVEN a user is playing a live game

steps.action: WHEN the scrubber bar is displayed
steps.result:
THEN the game matchup is displayed left justified above the scrubber bar
AND the away team is displayed to the left of the home team
AND the respective team logos are displayed (generic baseball image for non-MLB teams)
AND the respective team tri-codes are displayed
AND the selected broadcaster is displayed above the away team logo
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue when watching at the live point
AND the scrubber bar is blue on the left side of the playhead when watching behind the live point
AND there is a gradient behind the scrubber
AND the playback marker is at the current playback position during playback and pause
AND the user’s current playback position time is represented below the scrubber on the right hand side (H:MM:SS time format)
AND the closed captions button displays right justified above the scrubber bar
AND a "Watch Live" button displays to the right of the closed captions button if the user is watching behind the live point
AND "Details" is displayed left justified, below the scrubber bar (DM5/MLB Experience only)
AND "Broadcast Options" is displayed to the right of "Details", below the scrubber bar (DM5/MLB Experience only)

summary: Broadcast Options - UI - Single/National Feed
description:
GIVEN the feature flag for Broadcast Options is set to true (environments: dev, qa, beta)

AND the logged in user is entitled for game playback
AND the user has initiated playback of a Live or Archive game
AND the scrubber is displayed

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the down arrow
steps.result:
THEN focus is assigned to [Broadcast Options], text is black with a white background
AND "Video Feed" is displayed below Broadcast Options, left justified
AND the national video feed with broadcaster logo and broadcaster name is displayed below "Video Feed"
AND "Audio Feed" is displayed to the right of "Video Feed"
AND the audio feeds available for both teams are displayed below the "Audio Feed" heading
AND Audio buttons display the team logo followed by "TV" (for TV audio), "ES" (if Spanish), then broadcast name
AND the selected feed buttons have a blue background
AND focus is indicated with a white button background
AND unfocused/unselected buttons will have a white border with a transparent background
AND the scrubber bar shrinks in vertical size
AND the quick action buttons above the scrubber bar are hidden
AND the the game metadata/title is hidden

**NOTE:**
If more than 2 audio options are available, they will display in a grid with 2 per column
If a broadcast name is too long to fit in the button, an ellipsis will display on the right side of the button

steps.result:

AND the entire scrubber bar is blue when watching at the live point
AND the scrubber bar is blue on the left side of the playhead when watching behind the live point
AND the scrubber bar grey on the right side of the playhead when watching behind the live point
AND there is a gradient behind the scrubber
AND the playback marker is at the current playback position during playback and pause
AND the user’s current playback position time is represented below the scrubber on the right hand side (H:MM:SS time format)
AND the closed captions button displays right justified above the scrubber bar
AND a "Watch Live" button displays to the right of the closed captions button if the user is watching behind the live point

**Note:** If a FGotD has a saving pitcher, the FGotD pill will not display when the game tile has focus. The saving pitcher information will display in its place.

summary: Single Team subscriber National Feed archive - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN the us is a Single Team Subscriber
AND the subscribed-to-team is in the game
AND the game mediaFeedType = NATIONAL
AND the game mediaState = MEDIA_ARCHIVE

**NOTE:** National TV game = Fox Saturday Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the archived game tile
steps.result:
THEN buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the game feed
AND the user will see a feed button for the home team
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button

summary: Live indicator in-progress game behind live point
description: GIVEN a user is playing an in-progress game behind the live point

steps.action: WHEN the scrubber displays
steps.result:
THEN a grey dot is displayed directly to the left of grey text "Live"
AND the "Live" text is right justified underneath the scrubber bar

summary: Single Team subscriber archive game subscribed team - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF
AND an archive game includes the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the feed level entitled equals true for the subscribed-to-team
AND the feed level entitled equals false for the non-subscribed-to-team

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN a "LOCKED" badge does not display in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND "FINAL" displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game match up with respective score is displayed
AND the Pitching Results are displayed
AND the Broadcast Networks are displayed

summary: Scrubber UI - VOD/SVOD
description: GIVEN a user is playing a VOD/SVOD

steps.action: WHEN the scrubber bar is displayed
steps.result:
THEN the video title is displayed left justified above the scrubber bar
AND an ellipsis (...) is displayed at the end of the title if the title contains more than 30 characters
AND the entire scrubber bar is grey when playback starts from the beginning of the video
AND the scrubber bar turns blue on the left side of the playhead as the video plays
AND there is a gradient behind the scrubber
AND the playback marker is at the current playback position during playback and pause
AND the user’s current playback position time is represented below the scrubber on the right hand side (currentPlaybackTime/totalPlaybackTime H:MM:SS time format)
AND the closed captions button displays right justified above the scrubber bar

summary: Single Team subscriber FGotD archive - Game Tile
description: GIVEN the us is a Single Team Subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archived FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND a Free Game of the Day pill displays left justified at the bottom of the game tile

**Note:** If a FGotD has a saving pitcher, the FGotD pill will not display when the game tile has focus. The saving pitcher information will display in its place.

summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber FGotD archive - Feed Select
description: GIVEN a user is a Monthly/Yearly subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the team feeds
AND the user will see feed buttons for both teams
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button

summary: Broadcast Options - UI - Navigation
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for game playback
AND the user has initiated playback of a Live or Archive game
AND the scrubber is displayed

steps.action: WHEN focus is on the Broadcast Options menu
steps.result:
THEN pressing ‘down’ or 'X' will move focus to the first available video option
AND pressing ‘right' or 'left’ will move focus to the corresponding option on the right or left
AND pressing ‘right’ after reaching the right most option in the list will not move focus
AND pressing ‘left’ after reaching the left most option in the list will not move focus
AND pressing ‘down' or 'up’ will move focus to the corresponding option below or above
AND pressing ‘down’ after reaching the bottom most option in the list will not move focus
AND if focus is on the top most tile of any column, pressing ‘Up’ will return focus to “Broadcast Options”

summary: Broadcast Options - UI - Home/Away Feeds
description:
GIVEN the feature flag for Broadcast Options is set to true (environments: dev, qa, beta)
AND the logged in user is in the MLB experience
AND the logged in user is entitled for game playback
AND the user has initiated playback of a Live or Archive game
AND the scrubber is displayed

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the down arrow
steps.result:
THEN focus is assigned to [Broadcast Options], text is black with a white background
AND "Video Feed" is displayed below Broadcast Options, left justified
AND the home video feed with team logo and broadcaster name is displayed below "Video Feed"
AND the away video feed with team logo and broadcaster name is displayed below the home video feed
AND "Audio Feed" is displayed to the right of "Video Feed"
AND the audio feeds associated with the selected video feed/team are displayed below the "Audio Feed" heading
AND Audio buttons display the team logo followed by "TV" (for TV audio), "ES" (if Spanish), then broadcast name
AND the selected feed buttons have a blue background
AND focus is indicated with a white button background
AND unfocused/unselected buttons will have a white border with a transparent background
AND the scrubber bar shrinks in vertical size
AND the quick action buttons above the scrubber bar are hidden
AND the the game metadata/title is hidden

**NOTE:** 
If more than 2 audio options are available, they will display in a grid with 2 per column
If a broadcast name is too long to fit in the button, an ellipsis will display on the right side of the button

summary: Scrubber bar size based on focus
description:
GIVEN a user has initiated playback

**NOTE:** check in games player and forge player

steps.action:
WHEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the user navigates up or down using the controller

**NOTE:** Elements or features below the scrubber bar have not been implemented yet.
steps.result:
THEN the scrubber bar decreases in width/thickness (up and down)
AND the scrubber bar doesn't move its position up or down
AND after focus is reassigned to the playback head, the scrubber bar increases in width/thickness (up and down)
AND the scrubber bard doesn't move its position up or down
AND the elements above the scrubber do not move/adjust up or down, regardless of scrubber focus state
AND the elements below the scrubber do not move/adjust up or down, regardless of scrubber focus state

summary: FF Pill - Archive - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN Hide Spoilers is OFF
AND a user is playing an archive game

steps.action: WHEN the user engages fast forward
steps.result:
THEN the video is paused
AND the scrubber displays
AND a pill displays centered above the playhead
AND the pill contains the away team logo on the left side of the pill
AND the pill contains the home team logo on the right side of the pill
AND the respective score is displayed in the center of the pill
AND above the pill the elapsed time at the playhead will display
AND below the scrubber bar the inning at the playhead is displayed
AND the number of outs at the playhead is displayed to the right of the inning
AND the FF multiplier is displayed with two arrows pointing the the right

summary: Live indicator RW
description: GIVEN a user is playing an in-progress game at the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the user engages rewind for some time
AND plays the in-progress game before the live point
steps.result:
THEN the live indicator and text are hidden while rewind is engaged
AND a grey live indicator and grey text are displayed when video playback resumes

summary: SLIVE Rewind Stop
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Rewind
AND presses the "Select" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Rewind stopped
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Fast forward to video end
description:
GIVEN a user is playing an archive game
AND the playhead is in the middle of the scrubber bar

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates fast forward
AND the user does not stop fast forward
steps.result:
THEN the playhead fast forwards to the end of the video
AND fast forward stops automatically once the playhead reaches the end of the video
AND the video player is dismissed once fast forward stops
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page

summary: SLIVE Rewind to beginning
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch

steps.action: WHEN the user Rewinds the stream to the beginning
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops once it reaches the start of the stream
AND playback resumes at the beginning of the stream
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: End of archive game stream
description: GIVEN an archive game is playing

steps.action: WHEN the stream ends
steps.result:
THEN the video player is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page

summary: Game Details - Resume Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to archive game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND the user backs out of playback
AND waits 10 minutes to resume

steps.action:
WHEN the user Resumes playback of the archive game
AND the user focuses on Game Details below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN the pitcher/batter info matches the resumed playback position
AND the Linescore only displays info up to the point the user backed out of the archive

summary: SLIVE Fast Forward to Live Point
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action: WHEN the user Fast Forwards the stream to the live point
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops when it reaches the live point
AND playback resumes at the live point
AND the Live indicator is red
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: SLIVE Fast Forward Stop
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Fast Forward
AND presses the "select" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Fast Forward stopped
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Complete archive game playback
description: GIVEN a user is entitled for archive game playback

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates playback of an archive game from the beginning
AND the user watches the entire game to the end of the stream
steps.result:
THEN the user is able to watch a complete game
AND the user does not experience any errors during playback that cause the user to restart the app

summary: VOD Fast Forward to end
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND the user selects a VOD to watch

steps.action: WHEN the user Fast Forwards the video to the end
steps.result:
THEN the video player is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page

summary: FLIVE Fast Forward to Live Point
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND an FLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the FLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action: WHEN the user Fast Forwards the stream to the live point
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops when it reaches the live point
AND playback resumes at the live point
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: FLIVE Fast Forward Cancel
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND an FLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the FLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Fast Forward
AND presses the "O" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Fast Forward was initiated
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: VOD Rewind Stop
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND the user selects a VOD to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Rewind
AND presses the "select" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Rewind stopped
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Broadcast Options - Cannot Switch Video Feed - Single Team Subscriber
description:
GIVEN the user is a Single Team subscriber
AND the user selects a game that contains their subscribed team
AND the subscribed team game has home and away video feeds
AND the user has initiated playback of an archive feed for which they are entitled

steps.action:
WHEN the user has opened the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the video feed for the team which they are not subscribed
steps.result:
THEN a modal with a "Content Not Entitled" message is displayed with an "Okay" button
AND the subscribed team feed continues playing in the background

summary: FLIVE playback starts at live point
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND an FLIVE stream is in progress

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
steps.result:
THEN initPlaybackSession is called via a graphql network call
AND the video player enters full screen
AND playback starts at the live point
AND the playhead displays far right on the scrubber bar
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear Rewind Stop
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN
AND the user is logged in
AND the user selects the MLBN 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Rewind
AND presses the select button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Rewind stopped
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Archive game inning markers - Hide Spoilers ON
description: GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action: WHEN a user watches the archive game from the beginning
steps.result:
THEN inning markers are not displayed in the scrubber
AND as the half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead
AND the inning number indicates the beginning of the top of the inning
AND a down arrow indicates the beginning of the bottom of the inning

summary: Game Details - Resume Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to archive game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF
AND the user backs out of playback
AND waits 10 minutes to resume

steps.action:
WHEN the user Resumes playback of the archive game
AND the user focuses on Game Details below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN the pitcher/batter info matches the resumed playback position
AND the complete game Linescore displays

summary: Anonymous user cannot watch archive games
description: GIVEN an anonymous user has launched the app

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects an archive game to watch
AND the user selects a team feed to playback
steps.result:
THEN the archive game does not playback
AND the user is displayed the Subscriptions page

summary: SLIVE Jump to Live
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the user selects the "Jump to Live" button
steps.result:
THEN playback moves to the live point
AND the playhead is all the way to the right on the scrubber
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red Live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Closed Caption On persists application pause
description:
GIVEN closed caption setting is on
AND the app is open

steps.action:
WHEN the user taps the [PS] button to return to the PlayStation home screen
AND the user re-opens the app
AND the user plays all video types
steps.result:
THEN closed caption setting is on
AND closed captions are displaying for subsequent videos

summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear Pause/Play
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN
AND the user is logged in
WHEN the user selects the MLBN 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user presses the select button on the controller
AND the user presses the select button again after a a minute
steps.result:
THEN video playback pauses after the first button press
AND video playback resumes after the second button press
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
AND the live indicator is grey, indicating not at the live point
AND the "Jump to Live" button displays right justified above the scrubber bar

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio - Paid Subscriber
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for archive game playback
AND the user has initiated playback of an archive game

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options
AND the user selects a non-TV audio feed
steps.result:
THEN the newly selected audio feed begins playback
AND the audio feed is in-sync with the video feed
AND the scrubber is dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed - Resume Switched-From Feed
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for archive game playback
AND the selected game has home and away video feeds
AND the user initiates playback of the home team video feed

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the away team video feed
AND lets the away team feed play for at-least several moments
AND the user backs out of game playback
AND the user resumes the home team video feed from the feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN video playback resumes at the point from where video feeds were switched
AND the TV audio for the associated video feed is playing back
AND the audio is in-sync with the video

summary: Closed Caption On persists application close
description:
GIVEN closed caption setting is on
AND the app is open

steps.action:
WHEN the user holds the [PS] button
AND the user selects "Close Application"
AND the user re-opens the app
AND the user plays all video types
steps.result:
THEN closed caption setting is on
AND closed captions are displaying for subsequent videos

summary: SLIVE playback behind live point
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch

steps.action: WHEN the playhead is behind the live point
steps.result:
THEN the live indicator is gray
AND the "Jump to Live" button displays
AND the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead is blue
AND the scrubber bar to the right of the playhead gray
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: VOD Fast Forward Cancel
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app

steps.action:

steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Fast Forward was initiated
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio - Resume
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for archive game playback
AND the selected archive game has alt audio feeds
AND the user selects a video feed to initiate playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects an alt audio feed
AND lets the game continue playing back for at-least several moments
AND the user backs out of game playback
AND the user resumes the same video feed from the feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN video playback resumes at the bookmarked point
AND the alt audio feed that was selected before backing out is playing back
AND the alt audio is in-sync with the video

summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear Rewind Cancel
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN
AND the user is logged in
AND the user selects the MLBN 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Rewind
AND presses the back button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Rewind was initiated
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Game Details - 9 innings Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to archive game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND Start from the Beginning is selected for archive game playback of a 9 inning game

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning number the number of runs scored by each team in the associated inning are not displayed
AND each teams total runs are not displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits are not displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors are not displayed below "E"
AND the current Batter with stats is displayed to the right of the linescore
AND the current Pitcher with stats is displayed to the right of the current batter
AND after each run is scored, hit is logged, error is logged, the line score updates accordingly

steps.result:

AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning number the number of runs scored by each team in the associated inning are displayed
AND each teams total runs is displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits is displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors is displayed below "E"
AND the current Batter with stats is displayed to the right of the linescore
AND the current Pitcher with stats is displayed to the right of the current batter

description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Rewind

AND an up arrow indicates the beginning of the top of the inning

AND the game match up displays left justified above the scrubber bar
AND the scrubber bar playhead is appearing on the far left side of the scrubber bar
AND the elapsed time is right justified below the scrubber bar
AND "Broadcast Options" displays left justified, below the scrubber bar

**NOTE:** Broadcast Options are only enabled for DM5/MLB Experience, in non-PROD environments

summary: Tap Rewind
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a video
AND the scrubber is displayed

steps.action: WHEN a user taps the left d-pad button, L2 button, or the left analog stick to the left, multiple times
steps.result:
THEN for every tap, the RW speed increments 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256
AND video is paused while RW is engaged

summary: FLIVE Jump to Live
description:
GIVEN a user (paid/free/anonymous) has launched the MLB app
AND an FLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the FLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the user selects the "Jump to Live" button
steps.result:
THEN playback moves to the live point
AND the playhead is all the way to the right on the scrubber
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red Live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Game Details Navigation - Extra innings
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to archive game playback
AND Start from the Beginning is selected for archive game playback of an extra inning game

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to "Details" in the scrubber
AND the user navigates left, right, up, and down within the line score
AND selects a focused half inning
steps.result:
THEN the user is able to navigate to each half inning
AND the innings with associated runs shifts to the left as the user navigates to the 9th inning and beyond (9 innings will always display)
AND once the user reaches the final inning, the line score does not shift to the left
AND from the second-most-left inning column, the innings with associated runs shifts to the right as the user attempts to navigate to the first inning (9 innings will always display)
AND playback is moved to the beginning of the selected half inning

summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear Jump to Live
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN
AND the user is logged in
AND the user selects the MLBN 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the user selects the "Jump to Live" button
steps.result:
THEN playback moves to the live point
AND the playhead is all the way to the right on the scrubber
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red Live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Rewind to live stream start
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a live stream
AND the stream has been playing for some time

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates rewind
AND the user does not stop rewind
steps.result:
THEN the playhead rewinds to the beginning of the stream
AND once the playhead reaches the beginning of the stream, rewind stops automatically
AND once rewind stops, the stream starts playing from the beginning

summary: Game Details
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is entitled to archive game playback
AND archive game playback is initiated

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
steps.result: THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar

summary: Closed Caption Off
description:
GIVEN Closed Captions is "Off" on the settings page
AND a video is playing

steps.action: WHEN the scrubber displays
steps.result:
THEN the [CC] button displays far right above the scrubber bar
AND the [CC] button will display "CC" when it doesn't have focus
AND the [CC] button will display "CC TURN ON" when it has focus

summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear playback starts at live point
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN
AND the user is logged in

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch
steps.result:
THEN the video player goes full screen
AND the content title is displayed left justified above the scrubber bar
AND playback starts at the live point
AND the playhead displays far right on the scrubber bar
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed - Resume Switched-To Feed
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for archive game playback
AND the selected game has home and away video feeds
AND the user initiates playback of the home team video feed

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the away team video feed
AND lets the away team feed play for at-least several moments
AND the user backs out of game playback
AND the user resumes the away team video feed from the feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN video playback resumes at the bookmarked point
AND the TV audio for the associated video feed is playing back
AND the audio is in-sync with the video

summary: Fast forward to live stream live point
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a live stream
AND the playhead is not at the live point

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates Fast forward
AND the user does not stop fast forward
steps.result:
THEN the playhead fast forwards to the live point
AND once the playhead reaches the live point, fast forward stops automatically
AND once fast forward stops, the stream starts playing from the live point

summary: SLIVE Fast Forward Cancel
description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement

AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:

steps.result:

AND the current batter's headshot is displayed
