AND the current batter's in-game at-bat results, season average, season OPS is displayed to the right of the headshot, below the batter's name (data will update as the game progresses)
AND the current pitcher displays to the right of the current batter's name and stats
AND the current pitcher's headshot is displayed
AND the current pitcher's name is displayed to the right of the headshot
AND the current pitcher's in-game pitches, in-game innings pitched, season ERA is displayed to the right of the headshot, below the pitcher's name (data will update as the game progresses)

**NOTE:** if a player's headshot does not exist, an anonymous headshot will display

summary: Live Playback Wired Connection
description: GIVEN a users PlayStation is connected to the internet using a wired connection

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a live game to watch
steps.result: THEN the selected live game starts playing

summary: VOD Playback
description: GIVEN a logged in user is entitled for VOD content playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a VOD content tile for playback from the Home page

**NOTE:** VOD content carousels: "MLB Most Popular", "Get Caught Up", "Condensed Games", "Recaps", "<favorite_team> Most Popular"
steps.result: THEN the VOD content plays back from the beginning of the video

summary: Watch from the beginning live game inning markers - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers OFF
AND an in-progress game has started
AND the live point is after the top of the first inning

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the in-progress game to watch from the beginning
steps.result:
THEN the user begins watching at the beginning
AND inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar to the right of the playhead
AND as half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar
AND an upward pointing triangle indicates top of the inning
AND a downward pointing triangle indicates bottom of the inning
AND a number indicates the inning

summary: Watch Live inning markers - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers OFF
AND a game is in-progress

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an in-progress game to watch from the live point
steps.result:
THEN the user begins watching at the live point
AND inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead as the innings begin
AND as half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar
AND an upward pointing triangle indicates top of the inning
AND a downward pointing triangle indicates bottom of the inning
AND a number indicates the inning

summary: Date navigation using Calendar
description:
GIVEN the user is on the Games page
AND the user has selected the calendar button

**NOTE:** The calendar button is above the top-right game tile, to the right of the [>] right arrow button

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "<" or ">" buttons
AND selects a day in the month that has games
OR the user selects the "Today" button
steps.result:
THEN the appropriate month is displayed as the user presses the "<" or ">" buttons
AND the appropriate day with the appropriate games are displayed on the games page after the user selects a day

summary: SNLA+ 24/7 feed video error during playback
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user is on the SNLA+ page

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119
This will need to be tested on a Chrome browser using DevTools

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the Hero
AND lets the feed playback for a few moments
AND network requests to "tve-live.mlb.com" are blocked via Chrome DevTools
steps.result:
THEN playback of the 24/7 SNLA+ feed is unsuccessful
AND a Video Error modal displays with a "Go Back" button
AND the "Go Back" button navigates the user back to the SNLA+ page

summary: Entitlements - MLBALL
description: GIVEN the logged in user has MLBALL, SUBSCRIBERVOD, MiLBALL, MLBN entitlements

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects any entitled content for playback

**NOTE: Excluded Live Content**
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
steps.result: THEN the user receives successful playback of content

summary: Device Home Screen Deep Linking - MLBALL
description:
GIVEN an MLB.TV Free Game of the Day advertisement is displayed on the device home screen
AND an MLBALL entitled user is already logged into the app
AND the user is on the device home screen

**NOTE:** Work with a developer to get this set up

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the MLB.TV game advertisement on the device home screen
steps.result:
THEN the MLB.TV app opens
AND the video player is immediately launched 
AND the game referred to in the game advertisement begins playback

summary: Entitlements - STP
description:
GIVEN the logged in user has MLBTV_STP_<team_tri_code> and SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlements

**NOTE:** Single Team subscribers have the following entitlements: MLBTV_STP_<team_tri_code>, MLBAUDIO, SUBSCRIBERVOD, IPHONEATBATBAT, ANDROIDATBAT, MiLBALL, MLBN

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects any entitled content for playback

**NOTE: Excluded Live Content**
MVPD - ASG and Postseason
Partner - AppleTV+, Peacock
Blackouts - In-market games, ESPN Sunday Night Baseball
Games that do not involve the subscribed team
steps.result: THEN the user receives successful playback of entitled content

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for archive or live game playback
AND the selected archive or live game has alt audio feeds
AND the user selects a video feed to initiate playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects an alt audio feed
steps.result:
THEN video playback continues
AND the alt audio feed is playing back
AND the alt audio is in-sync with the video

summary: Rewind to live stream start
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a live game
AND the stream has been playing for some time

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates rewind
AND the user does not stop rewind
steps.result:
THEN the playhead rewinds to the beginning of the stream
AND rewind stops automatically at the beginning of the stream
AND the stream starts playing from the beginning
AND the scrubber bar is auto dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Fast forward to live stream live point
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a live game
AND the playhead is not at the live point

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates Fast forward
AND the user does not stop fast forward
steps.result:
THEN the playhead fast forwards to the live point
AND fast forward stops automatically at the live point
AND the stream starts playing from the live point
AND the Live indicator is red
AND the Jump to Live button is not displayed
AND the scrubber bar is auto dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Playback from Hero - Non-Game
description:
GIVEN a VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE is present in the Hero
AND a user entitled for playback is logged in

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the "Watch Now" button in the hero
steps.result:
THEN FLIVE/SLIVE starts playback at the live point
AND VOD/SVOD starts playback at the beginning

summary: mediaInfo called when scrubber is displayed
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled to live game playback
AND the user is in the MLB experience

**NOTE:** should be tested on a browser. Search network calls for "graphql". "mediaInfo" is one of the graphql calls.

steps.action:
WHEN the user displays the scrubber
AND keeps the scrubber displaying for at least 2 minutes
steps.result:
THEN mediaInfo is called when the scrubber displays
AND mediaInfo is called every 90 seconds while the scrubber displays

summary: Stop Fast Forward
description:
GIVEN a game feed is playing
AND Fast Forward has been initiated

steps.action: WHEN a user presses the "select" button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward is stopped
AND the playback head moves to the timestamp corresponding to when the [X] button was pressed
AND the video begins playback at the playback head position

summary: Device Home Screen Deep Linking - Anonymous
description:
GIVEN an MLB.TV Free Game of the Day advertisement is displayed on the device home screen
AND a user is not logged into the app
AND the user is on the device home screen

**NOTE:** Work with a developer to get this set up

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the MLB.TV game advertisement on the device home screen
steps.result:
THEN the MLB.TV app opens
AND the Welcome screen is displayed

summary: Live Game Playback - Start from the Beginning
description: GIVEN a user that is entitled for Live game playback is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a Live game for playback
AND the user selects a feed button
AND the user selects the "Start from the Beginning" button in the secondary Feed Select modal
steps.result:
THEN the user sees the Live game playing back from the beginning

**NOTE:** If the game is already in progress, the beginning will be right before the 1st inning. If the game is not in progress, the beginning will be at the beginning of the stream

summary: Game Details Navigation - 9 innings
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND playback of a 9 inning game is initiated

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to "Details" in the scrubber
AND the user presses down from the submenu
AND the user navigates left, right, up, and down within the line score
AND selects a focused half inning
steps.result:
THEN focus gets assigned to the to the current half inning based on the point of playback
AND the user is able to navigate to each half inning
AND playback is moved to the beginning of the selected half inning

summary: Complete live game playback
description: GIVEN a user is entitled for live game playback

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates playback of a live game before the first pitch
AND the user watches the entire game to the end of the stream
steps.result:
THEN the user is able to watch a complete game
AND the user does not experience any errors during playback that require the user to restart the app

summary: Jump to Live
description:
GIVEN the user is playing a live stream
AND playback is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the user displays the scrubber
AND the user selects the "Jump to Live" button
steps.result:
THEN the video jumps playback to the live point
AND the Live indicator in the scrubber is red
AND the scrubber playback head increases in size indicating it has focus

summary: Entitlements - Free
description: GIVEN the logged in user is a Free user with no entitlements

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects any VOD, FLIVE, or out-of-market Free Game of the Day
OR the user selects any SVOD, SLIVE, or non-Free Game of the Day
steps.result:
THEN the successfully receives playback for the VOD, FLIVE, or out-of-market Free Game of the Day
OR the user cannot playback any SVOD, SLIVE, or non-Free Game of the Day

summary: Play Archived Games
description: GIVEN an archive game is available

steps.action: WHEN a subscriber selects an archive game to watch
steps.result:
THEN the video player fills the screen
AND a loading screen with a spinning baseball image is displayed while the video is loading
AND the archive game starts playing
AND the scrubber bar displays
AND the scrubber bar is dismissed after 10 seconds of inactivity

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed - Paid Subscriber non-Single Team
description:
GIVEN the user is not anonymous, a free user, or a single team subscriber
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND the user is not blacked out from game playback
AND the user has initiated playback for a game that has home and away feeds

steps.action:
WHEN the user displays the scrubber
AND assigns focus to "Broadcast Options"
AND navigates to the video feed button that is not blue
AND presses the CROSS/X button
steps.result:
THEN the newly selected video feed starts playing back
AND audio playback is updated to the TV audio of the newly selected video feed
AND the scrubber is dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Game Details - Watch Live Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF
AND playback is initiated at the Live Point

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning number the number of runs scored by each team in the associated half-inning are displayed
AND each teams total runs is displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits is displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors is displayed below "E"
AND as the game progresses, Runs, Hits, and Errors are updated as they happen

summary: Resume live game inning markers - Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers ON
AND a user has exited an in-progress live game

steps.action: WHEN a user resumes an in-progress live game
steps.result:
THEN the video starts playing from the bookmarked point
AND inning markers display in the scrubber, to the left of the playback head, for the portion of the game the user has already watched
AND as the half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar
AND inning markers are not populated between the users watch point and the live point, to the right of the playback head

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio - FGoTD
description:
GIVEN the user is a free user
AND a live Free Game of the Day is not blacked out
AND the user has initiated playback of a live Free Game of the Day

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options
AND the user selects a non-TV audio feed
steps.result:
THEN the newly selected audio feed begins playback
AND the audio feed is in-sync with the video feed
AND the scrubber is dismissed

summary: Cancel Rewind
description:
GIVEN a game feed is playing
AND Rewind has been initiated

steps.action: WHEN a user presses the "back" button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN Rewind is stopped
AND the playback head moves back to the position before Rewind was initiated
AND the video begins playback at the playback head position

summary: SNY 24/7 feed video error during playback
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user is on the SNY page

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121
This will need to be tested on a Chrome browser using DevTools

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the Hero
AND lets the feed playback for a few moments
AND network requests to "tve-live.mlb.com" are blocked via Chrome DevTools
steps.result:
THEN playback of the 24/7 SNY feed is interrupted 
AND a Video Error modal displays with a "Go Back" button
AND the "Go Back" button navigates the user back to the SNY page

summary: Watch Live inning markers - Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers ON
AND a game is in-progress

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an in-progress game to watch from the live point
steps.result:
THEN the user begins watching at the live point
AND inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead as the innings begin
AND as half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar
AND an upward pointing triangle indicates top of the inning
AND a downward pointing triangle indicates bottom of the inning
AND a number indicates the inning

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed - FGoTD
description:
GIVEN the user is a free user
AND the user is not blacked out of a Free Game of the Day
AND the user has initiated playback for a live Free Game of the Day

steps.action:
WHEN the user displays the scrubber
AND assigns focus to "Broadcast Options"
AND navigates to the video feed button that is not blue
AND presses the CROSS/X button
steps.result:
THEN the newly selected video feed starts playing back
AND audio playback is updated to the TV audio of the newly selected video feed
AND the scrubber is dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Stream Error - non-blackout error non-video error
description: GIVEN a user is entitled to a video stream

steps.action:
WHEN an error occurs at the start of, or during video playback
AND the error is not a Blackout Error or a Video Error

**NOTE:** Best way to trigger this type of error is to start playback of an archive game from the beginning. Initiate FF for a few seconds, initiate playback again, then immediately after initiating playback again, initiate FF again. A spinning baseball should appear and after ~30 seconds the video error modal should trigger.
steps.result:
THEN the "Video Error" modal displays
AND the text "Please try again later." displays
AND the user cannot dismiss the modal by pressing the [O]/CIRCLE button on the controller
AND the user is navigated to the Games page after selecting the [Go Home] button
AND focus is assigned to the previously selected game tile

summary: Tap Rewind
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a game feed
AND the scrubber is displayed

steps.action: WHEN a user taps the left d-pad button, L2 button, or the left analog stick to the left, multiple times
steps.result:
THEN RW is engaged at speed 2x
AND for every tap, the RW speed increments 4x, 8x, 16x, 32x, 64x, 128x, 256x
AND the playback marker moves along the scrubber corresponding to the speed of RW
AND video is paused while RW is engaged

summary: Hide Spoilers OFF
description: GIVEN Hide Spoilers on the Settings page is set to OFF

steps.action:
WHEN the user views game tiles
OR the user views a game in the hero spot
steps.result:
THEN score, inning, balls/strikes, bases, pitcher, batter, or any other game information is not displaying in the game tile or the Hero spot
AND W/L/S pitchers are displayed in the game tile for archive games
OR the current pitcher with stats and the current batter with stats is displayed in the game tile for in-progress live games
OR the scheduled probable pitchers are displayed in the game tile for scheduled games (Pitcher TBD if a probable pitcher has not been assigned)

summary: Playback from Games carousel
description:
GIVEN a game is live
AND a user is logged in
AND entitled for game playback
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a live game for playback from the Games carousel

**NOTE:** The "Games" Carousel can also be called "Today's Lineup"
steps.result: THEN the game plays back successfully

summary: Exec user playback
description: GIVEN an Exec user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user attempts playback of a Live game
AND the user attempts playback of an Archive game
AND the user attempts playback of VOD content
AND the user attempts playback of SVOD content
AND the user attempts playback of MLBN 24/7 linear feed
AND the user attempts playback of an RSN 24/7 linear feed
AND the user attempts playback of RSN VOD content
steps.result:
THEN the user is able to successfully playback a Live game
AND the user is able to successfully playback an Archive game
AND the user is able to successfully playback VOD content
AND the user is able to successfully playback SVOD content
AND the user is able to successfully playback the MLBN 24/7 linear feed
AND the user is able to successfully playback the RSN 24/7 linear feed
AND the user is able to successfully playback RSN VOD content

summary: User is able to watch subsequent live games
description: GIVEN a user is playing a live game

steps.action:
WHEN a user exits a live game
AND a user selects a subsequent live game to watch
steps.result: THEN the subsequent live game plays successfully

summary: Toggle CC Off
description:
GIVEN Closed Captions are turned "On" on the Settings page
AND the user is entitled to live/archive game video playback

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the CC button in the scrubber
steps.result:
THEN Closed Captioning does not display during video playback
AND the Closed Captioning value on the Settings page displays "Off"

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed - Resume Switched-From Feed
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for live game playback
AND the user is not blacked out of the selected live game
AND the selected live game has home and away video feeds
AND the user initiates live playback of the home team video feed

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the away team video feed
AND lets the away team feed play for at-least several moments
AND the user backs out of game playback
AND the user resumes the home team video feed from the feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN video playback resumes at the point from where video feeds were switched
AND the TV audio for the associated video feed is playing back
AND the audio is in-sync with the video

summary: Video Error during playback
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled to a live feed or an archive feed
AND the user is playing a live feed or archive feed

steps.action:
WHEN a video error is encountered during playback

**NOTE:** Block network requests during video playback via Chrome DevTools.
Game network calls in QA

* .vtt:  https://tv-npd-fst.mlb.com
* .ts:  https://tv-npd-fst.mlb.com

Game network calls in PROD/DEV

* .vtt:  https://tv-fst.mlb.com or https://tv-gmc.mlb.com
* .ts:  https://tv-fst.mlb.com or https://tv-gmc.mlb.com

RSN/MLBN network calls in PROD/DEV

* .vtt:  https://tve-live.mlb.com
* .ts:  https://tve-live.mlb.com

SLIVE network calls in PROD/DEV

* .vtt:  https://svod-fst.mlb.com
* .ts:  https://svod-fst.mlb.com

VOD network calls in PROD/DEV

* .vtt, .ts: https://mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com
steps.result:
THEN a "Video Error" modal displays
AND the MLB logo and text is displayed center justified at the top of the screen
AND "Video Error" displays above "Please try again later." centered in the screen
AND an [Go Back] button is displayed with focus
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page after selecting the [Go Back] button

summary: Broadcast Options - Cannot Switch Video Feed - Single Team Subscriber
description:
GIVEN the user is a Single Team subscriber
AND the user is not blacked out of a live game
AND the user has initiated live playback of a video feed for which they are entitled

steps.action:
WHEN the user has opened the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the video feed for the team which they are not subscribed
steps.result:
THEN a modal with a "Content Not Entitled" message is displayed with an "Okay" button
AND the subscribed team feed continues playing in the background

summary: Toggle CC On
description:
GIVEN Closed Captions are turned "Off" on the Settings page
AND the user is entitled to live/archive game video playback

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the CC button in the scrubber
steps.result:
THEN Closed Captioning displays during video playback
AND the Closed Captioning value on the Settings page displays "On"

summary: Rewind to video start
description:
GIVEN a user is playing an archive game
AND the playhead is in the middle of the scrubber bar

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates rewind
AND the user does not stop rewind
steps.result:
THEN the playhead rewinds to the beginning of the video
AND rewind stops automatically once the playhead reaches the beginning of the video
AND the video starts playing from the beginning after rewind stops
AND the scrubber bar is auto dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Video Error at playback start
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled to a live feed or an archive feed
AND network calls are blocked/failing before playback is initiated

**NOTE:** Block network requests during video playback via Chrome DevTools.
Game network calls in QA

* .vtt:  [https://tv-npd-fst.mlb.com|https://tv-npd-fst.mlb.com/]
* .ts:  [https://tv-npd-fst.mlb.com|https://tv-npd-fst.mlb.com/]

Game network calls in DEV/PROD

* .vtt, .ts: [https://tv-fst.mlb.com|https://tv-fst.mlb.com/] - verified video error modal pre and during playback

RSN/MLBN network calls in DEV/PROD

* .vtt, .ts: [https://tve-live.mlb.com|https://tve-live.mlb.com/] - verified video error modal pre and during playback (30 sec delay)

VOD network calls in DEV/PROD

* .vtt, .ts: [https://mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com|https://mlb-cuts-diamond.mlb.com/] - verified video error modal pre and during playback (20 sec delay)

MiLB FGOTD network calls in DEV/PROD

* .vtt, .ts: [https://adhoc-hlslive-fst-gcp.mlb.com|https://adhoc-hlslive-fst-gcp.mlb.com/] - verified video error modal pre and during playback (30 sec delay)

MiLB Game (San Jose Giants) network calls in DEV/PROD

* .vtt, .ts: [https://tv.milb.com|https://tv.milb.com/] - verified during playback (30 sec delay), there is a call to milb-carousel ([https://dai.tv.milb.com/api/v2/playback-info/games/788393/contents/60899/products/milb-carousel|https://dai.tv.milb.com/api/v2/playback-info/games/788393/contents/60899/products/milb-carousel]), which prevents any playback ([tv.milb.com|http://tv.milb.com/]) if blocked before.

Update:SLIVE - Big Inning network calls in DEV/PROD

* .vtt, .ts: : [https://svod-fst.mlb.com|https://svod-fst.mlb.com/] - verified video error during playback (30 sec delay), there is a call to [https://dai.svod-fst.mlb.com/|https://dai.svod-fst.mlb.com/], which prevents any playback if blocked before.

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects a feed to watch
AND a video error is encountered at playback start
steps.result:
THEN a "Video Error" modal displays
AND the MLB logo and text is displayed center justified at the top of the screen
AND "Video Error" displays above "Please try again later." centered in the screen
AND a [Go Back] button is displayed with focus
AND the user is navigated back to the Previous page after selecting the [Go Back] button

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed - Resume Switched-To Feed
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for live game playback
AND the user is not blacked out of the selected live game
AND the selected live game has home and away video feeds
AND the user initiates live playback of the home team video feed

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the away team video feed
AND lets the away team feed play for at-least several moments
AND the user backs out of game playback
AND the user resumes the away team video feed from the feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN video playback resumes at the bookmarked point
AND the TV audio for the associated video feed is playing back
AND the audio is in-sync with the video

steps.action: WHEN the stream ends

summary: Playback from Games page
description:
GIVEN a game is live or archive
AND a user is logged in
AND entitled for game playback
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a live or archive game for playback
steps.result: THEN the game plays back successfully

summary: Pause/Play
description: GIVEN a user is playing a game feed

steps.action:
WHEN a user presses the "select" button on the controller once
AND presses the "select" button a second time
steps.result:
THEN the scrubber displays
AND the video pauses after the first button press
AND the screen displays a pause icon in the center of the screen for 1 second

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a SLIVE content tile for playback from the Home page

**NOTE:** SLIVE content example: "Big Inning"
steps.result: THEN the SLIVE content plays back from the live point

summary: Game Details - Resume Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF
AND the user backs out of playback at the Live Point
AND waits 10 minutes to resume

steps.action:
WHEN the user Resumes playback of the in-progress live game
AND the user focuses on Game Details below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN the pitcher/batter info matches the resumed playback position

summary: Broadcast Options - Reset Alt Audio - Start from the Beginning
description:
GIVEN a user is logged in

AND selects the same feed again, from the feed select modal

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio - Paid Subscriber
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for live game playback
AND the user is not blacked out of a live game
AND the user has initiated playback of a live game

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options
AND the user selects a non-TV audio feed
steps.result:
THEN the newly selected audio feed begins playback
AND the audio feed is in-sync with the video feed
AND the scrubber is dismissed

summary: Video playback during app pause
description: GIVEN a subscriber is playing a video stream

steps.action: WHEN the user pauses the app
steps.result:
THEN the video is paused
AND the app is dismissed
AND the user is on the device home screen
AND when the user opens the app again, the video displays paused at the playback point from when the app was paused
AND the user can start playback from the paused point

summary: MLBN Playback
description: GIVEN a logged in user is entitled for MLBN 24/7 feed playback

steps.action: WHEN the user selects MLBN Live content for playback from the Home page
steps.result: THEN the MLBN 24/7 feed plays back from the live point

summary: Hide Spoilers ON
description: GIVEN Hide Spoilers on the Settings page is set to ON

steps.action:
WHEN the user views game tiles
OR the user views a game in the hero spot
steps.result:
THEN score, inning, balls/strikes, bases, pitcher, or batter information is not displaying in the game tile or the Hero spot
AND "Hide Spoilers is ON" is displayed in the game tile for archive games
OR "Pitcher Hidden" and "Batter Hidden" is displayed in the game tile for in-progress live games
OR "Probable Pitcher Hidden" is displayed in the game tile for scheduled games

summary: Exit Archive Game
description:
GIVEN a user selects an archive game to watch
AND the video plays for several minutes
AND the scrubber is not displaying

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the [O] button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the archive game video is stopped
AND the video player is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page
AND the game tile of the selected game has focus

summary: Game Details Navigation - Extra innings
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND playback of an in-progress extra inning game is initiated

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to "Details" in the scrubber
AND the user presses down from the submenu
AND the user navigates left, right, up, and down within the line score
AND selects a focused half inning
steps.result:
THEN focus gets assigned to the current half inning based on the point of playback
AND the user is able to navigate to each half inning
AND the innings with associated runs shifts to the left as the user navigates to the 9th inning and beyond (9 innings will always display)
AND once the user reaches the final inning, the line score does not shift to the left
AND from the second-most-left inning column, the innings with associated runs shifts to the right as the user attempts to navigate to the first inning (9 innings will always display)
AND playback is moved to the beginning of the selected half inning

summary: Game Details
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND live game playback is initiated

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
steps.result: THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar

summary: Tap Fast Forward
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a game feed
AND the scrubber is displayed

steps.action: WHEN a user taps the right d-pad button, R2 button, or the left analog stick to the right
steps.result:
THEN FF is engaged at speed 2x 
AND for every tap, the FF speed increments 4x, 8x, 16x, 32x, 64x, 128x, 256x
AND the playback marker moves along the scrubber corresponding to the speed of FF
AND video is paused while FF is engaged

summary: FLIVE Playback
description: GIVEN a logged in user is entitled for FLIVE content playback

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a FLIVE content tile for playback from the Home page
steps.result: THEN the FLIVE content plays back from the live point

summary: Slow down Fast Forward
description:
GIVEN a user is fast forwarding a game feed
AND the fast forward speed is 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, or 256

steps.action: WHEN a user taps the left d-pad button, L2 button, or the left analog stick to the left
steps.result: THEN the fast forward speed decreases by one increment for every tap

summary: Game Details - Extra innings Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND Start from the Beginning playback is initiated for an in-progress extra inning game

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning number the number of runs scored by each team in the associated inning are not displayed
AND each teams total runs are not displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits are not displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors are not displayed below "E"
AND as the game progresses, Runs, Hits, and Errors are updated as they happen

summary: SNLA+ 24/7 feed video error at start up
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user is on the SNLA+ page
AND network requests to "tve-live.mlb.com" are blocked via Chrome DevTools

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119
This will need to be tested on a Chrome browser using DevTools

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN playback of the 24/7 SNLA+ feed is unsuccessful
AND a Video Error modal displays with a "Go Back" button
AND the "Go Back" button navigates the user back to the SNLA+ page

summary: Archive Game Playback - No Bookmarks
description: GIVEN an entitled user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects a previously unwatched archive game for playback
AND selects a feed
steps.result: THEN playback starts at the beginning of the stream

summary: Play live game from live point
description: GIVEN a live game is in-progress

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber selects a live game to watch
AND the user selects the [Watch Live] button in the secondary feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN the video player fills the screen
AND a spinning baseball is displayed while the video is loading
AND the live game starts playing from the live point
AND the scrubber displays
AND the scrubber disappears after 10 seconds of inactivity

summary: Archive Game Playback - Resume
description:
GIVEN an entitled user is logged in
AND the user has initiated archive game playback
AND has exited archived game playback

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects the previously watched archive game for playback
AND selects the previously watched feed
AND selects the "Resume" button in the secondary feed select modal
steps.result: THEN playback starts at the booked marked time

summary: Game Player Controls
description: GIVEN a user has initiated playback for a live or archive game

steps.action: WHEN the user initiates pause, fast forward, rewind, or play using the remote/controller
steps.result: THEN the stream reacts appropriately to the actions initiated

summary: Resume live game inning markers - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers OFF
AND a user has previously exited an in-progress live game

steps.action: WHEN a user resumes the in-progress game
steps.result:
THEN the video starts playing from the bookmarked point
AND inning markers display in the scrubber, to the left of the playback head, for the portion of the game the user has already watched
AND inning markers are populated between the users watch point and the live point, to the right of the playback head

summary: Exit Live Game
description:
GIVEN a user selects a live game to watch
AND the video plays for several minutes
AND the scrubber is not displaying

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the [O] button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the live game video is stopped
AND the video player is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page

summary: Game Details - Start from the Beginning Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND Start from the Beginning is selected for an in-progress live game

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning the number of runs scored by each team in the associated inning are not displayed
AND each teams total runs are not displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits are not displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors are not displayed below "E"
AND after each run is scored, hit is logged, error is logged, at the user's watch point, the line score updates accordingly
AND scoring info is displayed as it happens and after the watch point
AND scoring info is not displayed before the watch point

summary: Video playback during app close
description: GIVEN a subscriber is playing a video stream

steps.action:
WHEN the user presses and holds the [PS] button on the controller to bring them back to the Playstation home screen
AND presses the [Options] button on the controller
AND selects "Close App" from the menu
AND the user opens the app again
steps.result:
THEN the Home page is displayed
AND "Today's Games" are displayed on the Games carousel
AND a the user is able to resume the stream at the point when the [PS] button was pressed

summary: Cancel Fast Forward
description:
GIVEN a game feed is playing
AND Fast Forward has been initiated

steps.action: WHEN a user presses the "back" button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward is stopped
AND the playback head moves back to the position before Fast Forward was initiated
AND the video begins playback at the playback head position

summary: SVOD Playback
description: GIVEN a logged in user is entitled for SVOD content playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a SVOD content tile for playback from the Home page

**NOTE:** SVOD content carousels: "MLB.TV Original Shows", "MLB Network Presents"
steps.result: THEN the SVOD content plays back from the beginning of the video

summary: Closed Captions ON
description: GIVEN Closed Captions are set to OFF on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN a user sets Closed Captions to ON
steps.result:
THEN closed captions are displayed during video playback
AND the CC button in the scrubber displays "CC Turn OFF" with focus

summary: Game Details - Watch Live Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND playback is initiated at the Live Point

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning number behind the live point, the number of runs scored by each team in the associated inning are displayed
AND each teams total runs are displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits are displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors are displayed below "E"
AND as the game progresses, Runs, Hits, and Errors are updated as they happen

summary: Slow down Rewind
description:
GIVEN a user is rewinding a game feed
AND the rewind speed is 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, or 256

steps.action: WHEN a user taps the right d-pad button, R2 button, or the left analog stick to the right
steps.result: THEN the rewind speed decreases by one increment for every tap

summary: Log In
description:
GIVEN a user is not already logged in
AND a user is on the Log In page

steps.action:
WHEN a subscribers email address is entered in the "Email Address" field
AND the associated password is entered in the "Password" field
AND the user selects the "Log In" button
steps.result: THEN the user is successfully logged in

summary: Forge Player Controls
description: GIVEN a user has initiated playback of VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE content

steps.action: WHEN the user initiates pause, fast forward, rewind, or play using the remote/controller
steps.result: THEN the stream reacts appropriately to the actions initiated

summary: Anonymous user cannot watch live games
description:
GIVEN an anonymous user has launched the app
AND a live game is in progress

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a live game to watch
steps.result: THEN the live game does not playback

summary: Date navigation using Games page
description: GIVEN a user is on the games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "<" or ">" buttons
OR the user selects the "Today" button
steps.result: THEN the appropriate day with the appropriate games are displayed

summary: Archive Game Playback - Start from the Beginning
description:
GIVEN an entitled user is logged in
AND the user has initiated archive game playback
AND has exited archived game playback

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects the previously watched archive game for playback
AND selects the previously watched feed
AND selects the "Start from the Beginning" button in the secondary feed select modal
steps.result: THEN playback starts at the beginning of the feed

summary: Log Out
description:
GIVEN a user is already logged in
AND a user is on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the "Log Out" button
steps.result:
THEN the user is successfully logged out
AND the "Log Out" button has changed to the "Log In" button

summary: Stop Rewind
description:
GIVEN a game feed is playing
AND Rewind has been initiated

steps.action: WHEN a user presses the "select" button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN Rewind is stopped
AND the playback head moves to the timestamp corresponding to when the [X] button was pressed
AND the video begins playback at the playback head position

summary: Device Home Screen Deep Linking - Free
description:
GIVEN an MLB.TV Free Game of the Day advertisement is displayed on the device home screen
AND a free user is already logged into the app
AND the user is on the device home screen

**NOTE:** Work with a developer to get this set up

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the MLB.TV game advertisement on the device home screen
steps.result:
THEN the MLB.TV app opens
AND the video player is immediately launched 
AND the game referred to in the game advertisement begins playback

summary: Game Details - Resume Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND the user backs out of playback at the Live Point
AND waits 10 minutes to resume

steps.action:
WHEN the user Resumes playback of the in-progress live game
AND the user focuses on Game Details below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN the pitcher/batter info matches the resumed playback position
AND the Linescore does not display any updated info that occurred after the user exited the feed

summary: Game Details - Extra innings Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF
AND playback is initiated at the live point of an extra inning game

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND a ">" displays after the extra inning, between the away and home teams
AND below each inning number, the number of runs scored by each team in the associated inning are displayed
AND each teams total runs is displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits is displayed below "H"
And each teams total errors is displayed below "E"
AND as the game progresses, Runs, Hits, and Errors are updated as they happen

summary: Closed Captions OFF
description: GIVEN Closed Captions are set to ON on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN a user sets Closed Captions to OFF
steps.result:
THEN closed captions do not display during video playback
AND the CC button in the scrubber displays "CC Turn ON" with focus

summary: Watch from the beginning live game inning markers - Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a user has Hide Spoilers ON
AND an in-progress game has started
AND the live point is after the top of the first inning

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the in-progress game to watch from the beginning
steps.result:
THEN the user starts watching the game from the broadcast start point
AND inning markers are not populated to the right of the playback head
AND as the half innings begin, inning markers are populated in the scrubber bar, to the left of the playback head

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Video Feed
description:
GIVEN the user is not anonymous, a free user, or a single team subscriber
AND the user is entitled to archive or live game playback
AND the user has initiated playback for an archive or live game that has home and away feeds

steps.action:
WHEN the user displays the scrubber
AND assigns focus to "Broadcast Options"
AND navigates to the video feed button that is not blue
AND presses the select button
steps.result:
THEN the newly selected video feed starts playing back
AND audio playback is updated to the TV audio of the newly selected video feed
AND the scrubber is dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Live Playback Wireless Connection
description: GIVEN a users PlayStation is connected to the internet using a wireless connection

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a live game to watch
steps.result: THEN the selected live game starts playing

summary: Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio - Resume
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled for live game playback
AND the user is not blacked out of the selected live game
AND the selected game has alt audio feeds
AND the user selects a video feed to initiate live playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects an alt audio feed
AND lets the game continue playing back for at-least several moments
AND the user backs out of game playback
AND the user resumes the same video feed from the feed select modal
steps.result:
THEN video playback resumes at the bookmarked point
AND the alt audio feed that was selected before backing out is playing back
AND the alt audio is in-sync with the video

summary: Game Details - Start from the Beginning Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN the user is logged in
AND the user is in the MLB experience
AND the user is entitled to live game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF
AND Start from the Beginning is selected for an in-progress live game

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates the scrubber bar to display
AND the user assigns focus to the Details tab below the scrubber bar
steps.result:
THEN "Details" is the furthest left position below the scrubber bar
AND the inning numbers are displayed above the game matchup
AND after the inning numbers, to the right, "R" is displayed for runs, "H" is displayed for hits, "E" is displayed for errors
AND the away team displays above the home team
AND below each inning of play that has been completed or in-progress, the number of runs scored by each team is displayed
AND each teams total runs is displayed below "R"
AND each teams total hits is displayed below "H"
AND each teams total errors is displayed below "E"

summary: Live Game Playback - Resume
description:
GIVEN an entitled user is logged in
AND the user has selected a Live game for playback 
AND the user has exited a Live game

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the same game for playback
AND selects the same feed
AND selects the "Resume" button in the secondary feed select modal
steps.result: THEN playback resumes at the bookmarked time

summary: Broadcast Options - Cannot Switch Video Feed - Single Team Subscriber - Resume
description:
GIVEN the user is a Single Team subscriber
AND the user is not blacked out of a live game
AND the user has initiated live playback of a video feed for which they are entitled

steps.action:
WHEN the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
AND the user selects the video feed for the team which they are not subscribed
AND the user selects the "Okay" button on the "Content Not Entitled"
steps.result:
THEN the "Content Not Entitled" modal is dismissed
AND the subscribed team feed continues playing
AND focus is assigned to the video feed button for which they are not entitled
AND the scrubber is dismissed after 10 seconds

summary: Hero - Live game playback - Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for live game playback
AND a live game is present in the Hero
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

When a user has Hide Spoilers ON and clicks Watch Now from the featured content space, playback should launch at the beginning of the stream

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the featured image from the Hero/featured content space
steps.result:
THEN playback should launch at the beginning of the stream

**NOTE:** if the game is in progress and the live point is after the first pitch, the beginning of the stream will be the broadcast start point before the first pitch. Timecode will not be 00:00. If live point it before the first pitch, the beginning of the stream will be the beginning of the stream. Timecode will be 00:00.

summary: DataDog Playback Heuristics
description:
GIVEN the tester is logged into DataDog
AND the tester has the "Playback Heuristics" page open
AND the tester has logged into the app with a test user
AND the tester has initiated playback of content

**NOTE:** Playback Heuristics URL: https://us5.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%22PLAYBACK%20HEURISTICS%22%20%40usr.id%3A00uhs4yw8qjJKy4xb357&agg_m=%40event.metadata.currentBitrate&agg_m_source=base&agg_q=%40asset.isLive&agg_q_source=base&agg_t=avg&analyticsOptions=%5B%22line%22%2C%22dog_classic%22%2Cnull%2Cnull%5D&cols=host%2Cservice%2C%40usr.id%2C%40event.action%2C%40event.reason%2C%40event.metadata.convivaTimestamp&context_event=AY_CgMDtAAD8tvFqYXPtGgAB&fromUser=true&messageDisplay=inline&refresh_mode=sliding&storage=hot&stream_sort=%40convivaTimestamp%2Casc&top_n=10&top_o=top&view=spans&viz=&x_missing=true&from_ts=1726669870274&to_ts=1726684270274&live=true

steps.action:
WHEN the tester updates the "@usr.id" in the Playback Heuristics search bar to the Okta ID of the logged in test user
AND clicks on the Events returned in the search results
steps.result:
THEN the Event Attributes should contain the values being tested from the Jira ticket
AND the user’s email address is not displayed in the logs

summary: mediaInfo is not called when the scrubber is not displayed
description:
GIVEN the user is entitled to live game playback
AND the user is in the MLB experience

**NOTE:** should be tested on a browser. Search network calls for "graphql". "mediaInfo" is one of the graphql calls.

steps.action:
WHEN playback of a live game is initiated
AND live playback continues without the scrubber displaying
steps.result:
THEN mediaInfo is called when the live game feed is launched
AND mediaInfo is not called while the scrubber is not displaying

summary: Hero - Live game playback - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for live game playback
AND a live game is present in the Hero
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: When a user selects the featured image from the Hero/featured content space
steps.result: THEN playback should launch at the live point

summary: Playback from Hero - Game
description:
GIVEN a live game is present in the Hero
AND a user entitled for live game playback is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the hero

**NOTE:** If Hide Spoilers is ON, the button should say "Watch Now"
steps.result:
THEN the game starts playback at the live point

**NOTE:** If Hide Spoilers is ON, playback will start at the beginning

summary: Live Game Playback - Watch Live
description: GIVEN a user that is entitled for Live game playback is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a Live game for playback
AND the user selects a feed button
AND the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the secondary Feed Select modal
steps.result: THEN the user sees the Live game playing back at the live point

summary: Exit Game to Home Page
description:
GIVEN the subscriber is logged into mlb.com
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback
AND the subscriber has initiated archive game playback from the Games carousel

steps.action:
WHEN the user lands on mlb.com
AND the user presses the O (circle) button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the video player should be dismissed
AND the user should be returned back to the Home page
AND focus should be assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the Hero

summary: Home and Away Feeds
description:
GIVEN the subscriber is logged into mlb.com
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback
AND the subscriber has initiated archive game playback from the Games carousel

steps.action:
WHEN the user clicks "MLB.TV" 
AND the user lands on the “MLB.TV Welcome Center | Major League Baseball” page
steps.result:
THEN the video player should be dismissed
AND the user should be returned back to the Home page
AND focus should be assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the Hero

summary: SNLA+ tab displays in the Header
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the user logs in
steps.result:
THEN the user should see [Home], [SNLA+], [Games], [Upgrade MLB.TV], [Settings] in the header

**NOTE:** If the test user also has one of the following entitlements, "EXECMLB", "MLBALL", "MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS", "MLBVIDEOAR", [Upgrade MLB.TV] will NOT display.

summary: Bookmarked carousel position navigating away from Home page
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Home page
AND focus is present in a carousel
AND focus is not assigned to the first item in a carousel

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates away from the Home page
AND the user navigates back to the Home page
steps.result: THEN the previously focused carousel has been reset to its original order

summary: Assign Focus - Home tab to first carousel
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is entitled for video playback
AND non-playable content (scheduled game) is present in the hero
AND focus is assigned to the Home tab in the navigation header

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the down arrow on the controller
steps.result:
THEN focus is indicated with a white border around the tile
AND focus is assigned to the first carousel
AND focus is assigned to the furthest left full tile in the carousel

summary: Single/National Feed
description:
GIVEN the subscriber is entitled for LIVE game playback
AND the subscriber is logged into mlb.com
AND a game is live with a single/national video feed
AND the game is not blacked out

steps.action: WHEN the user lands on mlb.com League
steps.result:
THEN the user should see the feed picker open for the selected game

AND focus should be assigned to the only video feed option

AND the user should receive playback after selecting the video feed button

summary: VOD - Free User
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is a free user
AND VOD content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the VOD content in the hero
AND the title for the VOD content in the hero is displayed
AND the description for non-game content in the hero is displayed
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text
AND the "Watch Now" button has focus when the Home page loads
AND the VOD content playback is successful after the user selects the "Watch Now" button

summary: Game States - Live - Suspended - Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Live state
AND the game is Suspended
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (T,TR,TS,TG,TV,TF,TC,TD,TB,TP,TL,TE,TA,TO,TI,TU,UR,US,UG,UV,UF,UC,UD,UP,UL,UE,UA,UO,U,UZ,UI,UU)
steps.result: THEN a pill with the text "SUSPENDED" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero

summary: Dismiss Feed Picker
description:
GIVEN the subscriber is logged into mlb.com
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback
AND the subscriber has initiated archive game playback from the Games carousel

steps.action: WHEN the user lands on mlb.com
steps.result:
THEN the video player should be dismissed
AND the user should be returned back to the Home page
AND focus should be assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the Hero

summary: No Scheduled Games - Offseason/All-Star break
description: GIVEN there are no games scheduled for the day

steps.action: WHEN the user loads the Home page
steps.result: THEN the Games carousel should not display

summary: SNLA+ 24/7 feed - DAI Ads failover at stream start
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net" are blocked
OR network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net" are failing

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119
THIS NEEDS TO BE TESTED IN A BROWSER

steps.action: WHEN the user initiates playback of the 24/7 SNLA+ feed
steps.result:
THEN playback is initiated with no video error modal popping up
AND a gsId is not displayed in the lower right corner of the screen

summary: Assign Focus - Watch Now button to first carousel
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is entitled for video playback
AND playable content is present in the hero
AND focus is on the "Watch Now" button in the hero

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the down arrow on the controller
steps.result:
THEN focus is indicated with a white border around the tile
AND focus is assigned to the first carousel
AND focus is assigned to the furthest left full tile in the carousel

summary: One Scheduled Game - ASG/Postseason
description:
GIVEN there is 1 game scheduled for the day
AND the 1 game is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN the user loads the Home page
steps.result: THEN the Games carousel should not display

summary: Jump to navigation header on Home page
description: GIVEN the user is on the Home page

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to the bottom of the Home page
OR assigns focus to any element on the page
AND the user presses the [triangle] button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the [Home] button in the navigation header at the top of the screen gains focus
AND the page scrolls to the top
AND the user stays on the Home page

summary: SNY 24/7 feed playback
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the [SNY] button in the header
AND selects the Featured Image in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN initPlaybackSession is called via a graphql network call
AND the SNY 24/7 linear feed plays back successfully
AND the video title displays left justified above the scrubber bar

summary: Fetch SNLA+ data via contentCollections
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the user successfully logs in
steps.result:
THEN a "contentCollections" network call is made via "graphql"
AND the data returned from "contentCollections" is stored in Redux under "rsn"

**NOTE:** This needs to be tested with access to network calls, and Redux. Best way is via Chrome. Redux is a browser extension that may need to be downloaded and added to your browser.

summary: SNY 24/7 feed - DAI requests stop after exiting a stream
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user has initiated playback of the 24/7 SNY feed

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action: WHEN a user exits the 24/7 live stream
steps.result:
THEN video playback is dismissed
AND "id3-events.json" network calls to dai.google.com are no longer occurring

**NOTE:** Entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools should filter out the id3-events.json network calls

summary: SVOD - Anonymous
description:
GIVEN a user is anonymous
AND SVOD content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a user loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the SVOD content in the hero
AND the title for the SVOD content in the hero is displayed
AND the description for the SVOD content in the hero is displayed
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text
AND the "Watch Now" button has focus when the Home page loads
AND a lock icon displays in the "Watch Now" button
AND the user lands on the paywall/subscriptions page after selecting the "Watch Now" button w/ a lock icon

summary: Carousel navigation to the right
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Home page
AND focus is assigned to a carousel

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the right arrow on the controller
steps.result:
THEN focus remains on the furthest left full tile
AND the tile that was previously to the right of the focused tile is now in the focused position of the carousel
AND focus remains on the tile once the user reaches the last tile in the carousel
AND the user can no longer continue navigating right through the carousel once the end of the carousel has been reached

summary: SLIVE - Entitled
description:
GIVEN a subscriber has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND SLIVE content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
MANUAL

THEN a related background image is displayed for the SLIVE content in the hero
AND a LIVE indicator displays left justified above the title
AND the title for the SLIVE content is displayed in the Hero
AND the description for the SLIVE content is displayed in the Hero
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text
AND the "Watch Now" button has focus when the Home page loads

AUTOMATION
AND the SLIVE content playback is successful after the user selects the "Watch Now" button

summary: Smooth scrolling during navigation
description: GIVEN user is on the Home page

steps.action:
WHEN the user presses the [UP] or [DOWN] buttons on the controller
AND the user presses the [LEFT] or [RIGHT] buttons on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the screen smoothly scrolls vertical as the user navigates up and down the page
AND the carousels smoothly scroll horizontal as the user navigates left and right through the carousels

summary: Game States - Live - Delayed - Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Live state
AND the game is Delayed
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (IV,IP,IY,IE,IA,IO,IZ,IR,IS,IG,IF,IC,ID,IB,IL,II))
steps.result: THEN a pill with the text "DELAYED" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero

summary: SNY 24/7 feed video error at start up
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user is on the SNY page
AND network requests to "tve-live.mlb.com" are blocked via Chrome DevTools

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121
This will need to be tested on a Chrome browser using DevTools

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN playback of the 24/7 SNY feed is unsuccessful
AND a Video Error modal displays with a "Go Back" button
AND the "Go Back" button navigates the user back to the SNY page

summary: Favorite team carousel displays
description:
Given a user has an MLB account
AND a favorite team is set

steps.action: WHEN the user loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN the users favorite team carousel called "{team_name} Most Popular", displays below the MLB Most Popular carousel
AND content is present in the favorite team carousel
AND the user is able to playback content from the carousel

summary: Featured non-game tiles - not entitled unfocused
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND the user does not have the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user is logged in
OR the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a logged in user views an unfocused SVOD feature tile
OR a not logged in user views any unfocused non-game feature tile
steps.result:
THEN the featured tiles are the size of 2 regular forge content tiles
AND the associated thumbnail displays as the background of the entire tile
AND there is a slight gradient from the bottom
AND the title displays left justified at the bottom of the tile
AND the video duration is displayed left justified above the title
AND the video published date displays to the right of the video duration
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the tile

summary: Featured non-game tile selection - not entitled
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND the user does not have the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user is logged in
OR the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a logged in user selects an SVOD featured tile for playback
OR a not logged in user selects any non-game featured tile for playback
steps.result:
THEN the user is unable to playback content
AND the not entitled user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page after selecting not entitled content
AND the not entitled user is navigated to the Home page after pressing the BACK button on the controller
AND focus is assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the hero

**Note:** If "Watch Now" button is not present in the Hero, focus should be assigned to the Home tab in the navigation header

summary: Basic non-game tile selection - not entitled
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND the user does not have the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user is logged in
OR the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a logged in user selects an SVOD/SLIVE basic tile for playback
OR a not logged in user selects any non-game basic tile for playback
steps.result:
AND the not entitled user is unable to playback content
AND the not entitled user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page after selecting not entitled content
AND the not entitled user is navigated to the Home page after pressing the CIRCLE button on the controller
AND focus is assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the hero

**Note:** If "Watch Now" button is not present in the Hero, focus should be assigned to the Home tab in the navigation header

summary: SLIVE - Anonymous
description:
GIVEN a user is anonymous
AND SLIVE content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a user loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the SLIVE content in the hero

AND the title for the SLIVE content in the hero is displayed
AND the description for the SLIVE content in the hero is displayed
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text

AND a lock icon displays in the "Watch Now" button
AND the user lands on the paywall/subscriptions page after selecting the "Watch Now" button w/ a lock icon

summary: Home page load
description: GIVEN a user is not on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the Home tab in the navigation header
steps.result: THEN the Home page loads

summary: VOD - Anonymous
description:
GIVEN a user is anonymous
AND VOD content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a user loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the VOD content in the hero
AND the title for the VOD content in the hero is displayed
AND the description for non-game content in the hero is displayed
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text
AND the "Watch Now" button has focus when the Home page loads
AND the VOD content playback is successful after the user selects the "Watch Now" button

summary: MiLB carousel displays
description:
Given a user has an MLB account
AND a favorite team is set

steps.action: WHEN the user loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a carousel called "{team_name} Affiliated MiLB Games", displays below the Games carousel
AND content is present in the MiLB carousel
AND the user is able to playback content from the carousel

summary: Single/National Feed
description:
GIVEN the subscriber is logged into mlb.com
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback
AND the subscriber has initiated archive game playback from the Games carousel

steps.action:
WHEN the user clicks "MLB.TV" 
AND the user lands on the “MLB.TV Welcome Center | Major League Baseball” page
steps.result:
THEN the video player should be dismissed
AND the user should be returned back to the Home page
AND focus should be assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the Hero

summary: Settings to Home

GIVEN a user is on the Home page
AND navigates to the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates back to the Home page
steps.result: THEN the Home page loads with the most up to date information

summary: Basic non-game tiles - entitled unfocused
description:
GIVEN the user has the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
OR the user is a free user
AND the user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a user with SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement views an unfocused VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE basic tile
OR a free user views an unfocused VOD/FLIVE basic tile
steps.result:
THEN the associated thumbnail displays
AND the duration of the VOD/SVOD content is displayed in the lower right corner of the thumbnail
AND the title is displayed left justified below the associated thumbnail
AND the video published date is displayed left justified below the title
AND the user does not see a lock icon in the upper right corner of the tile
AND the tile is the same width as the game tiles
AND two tiles are the same width as one featured tile

summary: Non-MLB Team Logo - Hero
description:
GIVEN a matchup between an MLB team and a non-MLB team is on the schedule

**NOTE:** Matchups between MLB teams and non-MLB teams occur during Spring Training

steps.action: WHEN a matchup between an MLB team and a non-MLB team is displayed in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the logo for the non-MLB team is displayed as a generic baseball

summary: Basic non-game tiles - not entitled focused
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND the user does not have the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user is logged in
OR the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a logged in user views a focused SVOD basic tile
OR a not logged in user views any focused non-game basic tile
steps.result:
THEN the tile has a white border to indicate focus
AND the associated thumbnail displays
AND the duration of the SVOD content is displayed in the lower left corner of the thumbnail
AND the title is displayed left justified below the associated thumbnail
AND the video description displays left justified below the title
AND user sees a lock icon in the upper right corner of the tile
AND the tile is the same width as the game tiles
AND two tiles are the same width as one featured tile

summary: SNY contentCollections calls are made in 5 minute intervals
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action: WHEN the user sits stationary in the app
steps.result: THEN "contentCollections" calls are made via "graphql" every 5 minutes

summary: Game States - Final - Forfeit - Hide Spoilers OFF

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Final state
AND one of the teams in the game has Forfeited
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (Q,QK,QX,QQ,QJ,QI,QN,QV,QR,QO,R,RR,RK,RX,RQ,RJ,RI,RN,RV,RO)
steps.result: THEN a pill with the text "<TRICODE of forfeit team> - FORFEIT" is displayed above the team info in the Hero

summary: Home and Away Feeds
description:
GIVEN the subscriber is entitled for LIVE game playback
AND the subscriber is logged into mlb.com
AND a game is LIVE with home and away video feeds

steps.action: WHEN the user is on mlb.com
steps.result:
THEN the user should see the feed picker open for the selected game

AND focus should be assigned to the away team video feed option

summary: Exit Game to Home Page
description:
GIVEN I am logged into mlb.com
AND the game must be a LIVE game

steps.action:
WHEN I click on any LIVE game
AND I click the play indicator to stop playing the game
AND I click on "MTV.Home"
steps.result:
THEN the game should stop playing
AND I should be returned to the MLB.TV | Welcome Center | MLB.com page

summary: MLB Network Not Entitled - Hero
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is not entitled with the MLB Network entitlement (MLBN)
AND a game for the subscribers favorite team is not present in the Hero
AND an MLB Network feed is returned in the "featured" node in the MAST response
AND "live: true" is returned in the the "hero" node in the MAST response

steps.action: WHEN the subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN MLB Network does not display in the Hero
AND MLB Network does not display in the Today’s Lineup carousel

summary: Game States - Final - Postponed - Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Final state
AND the game is Postponed
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (DR,DS,DG,DV,DF,DC,DD,DB,DP,Dl,DE,DA,DO,DI)
steps.result:
THEN a pill with the text "FINAL" is displayed above the team info in the Hero
AND a pill with the text "POSTPONED" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero

summary: LG Only - Back button prompts Exit
description:
GIVEN the user is on the Home page
AND focus is assigned to the Home tab in the header navigation

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the BACK button on the remote control
steps.result:
THEN an LG/webOS modal displays
AND the modal asks the user if they want to quit the app
AND pressing "Exit" in the modal closes the app
OR pressing "Cancel" in the modal dismisses the modal

summary: SNLA+ VOD Playback
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user is on the SNLA+ page

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a VOD tile from a carousel
steps.result:
THEN initPlaybackSession is called via a graphql network call
AND the VOD plays back successfully
AND the video title displays left justified above the scrubber bar

summary: SNLA+ 24/7 feed - Mid-roll DAI Ads
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user has initiated playback of the 24/7 SNLA+ feed
AND the 24/7 SNLA+ stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND an asset key is is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119
Enter "graphql" into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession
THIS NEEDS TO BE TESTED IN A BROWSER

steps.action: WHEN an ad break is triggered
steps.result:
THEN we should see ads playing back
AND "id3-events.json" network calls are being made
AND the "id3-events.json" network calls have a request URL starting with "https://dai.google.com/"

**NOTE:** Entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools should filter out the id3-events.json network calls

summary: MLB Network Entitled - Hero
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is entitled with the MLB Network entitlement (MLBN)
AND a game for the subscribers favorite team is not present in the Hero
AND an MLB Network feed is returned in the "featured" node in the MAST response
AND "live: true" is returned in the the "hero" node in the MAST response

steps.action: WHEN the subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN MLB Network displays in the Hero
AND a "Watch Now" button displays without a lock icon
AND the MLB Network feed plays back after the user selects the "Watch Now" button

summary: SNLA+ 24/7 feed playback
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+

AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the [SNLA+] button in the header

steps.result:
THEN initPlaybackSession is called via a graphql network call
AND the SNLA+ 24/7 linear feed plays back successfully
AND the video title displays left justified above the scrubber bar

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Final state
AND one of the teams in the game has Forfeited
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (Q,QK,QX,QQ,QJ,QI,QN,QV,QR,QO,R,RR,RK,RX,RQ,RJ,RI,RN,RV,RO)
steps.result: THEN a pill with the text "<TRICODE of forfeit team> - FORFEIT" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero

description:
GIVEN a subscriber has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND SVOD content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the SVOD content in the hero

summary: Games carousel date flip
