GIVEN a user is on the Home page
AND the current time is before 10am ET
AND games were on the schedule yesterday
AND games are on the schedule today

steps.action:
WHEN the user is stagnate on the Home page
AND time passes the 10am ET threshold
steps.result:
THEN the games carousel updates with today's games
AND yesterday's games are not displayed in the Games Carousel

summary: SNY 24/7 feed - DAI Ads failover at stream start
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY

AND the user logs in
AND network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net" are blocked
OR network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net" are failing

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.result:
THEN playback is initiated with no video error modal popping up
AND a gsId is not displayed in the lower right corner of the screen

summary: SNY 24/7 feed - Mid-roll DAI Ads failover mid-stream
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app

AND the user has initiated playback of the 24/7 SNY feed
AND the 24/7 SNY stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND an asset key is is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121
Enter "graphql" into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession
THIS NEEDS TO BE TESTED IN A BROWSER

steps.action:
WHEN an ad break is triggered
AND network calls to "dai.google.com*" are blocked
OR network calls to "dai.google.com*" are failing
steps.result:
THEN the stream continues to playback with no video error modal popping up
AND ads playback during ad breaks

description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user has initiated playback of the 24/7 SNLA+ feed

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN a user exits the 24/7 live stream
steps.result:
THEN video playback is dismissed

**NOTE:** Entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools should filter out the id3-events.json network calls

summary: Hero Title and Description
description:

NOTE: MAST call example
https://mastapi.mobileqa.mlbinfra.com/api/epg/v3/search?exp=LEGACY&favoriteTeam=119

steps.action: WHEN Forge content is displaying in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN the title displays the value of the "heading" key in the returned Dapi url of the MAST call
AND the description displays the value of the "text" key in the returned Dapi url of the MAST call

NOTE: Dapi URL from MAST call example https://dapi-qa.mlbinfra.com/v2/content/en-us/vsmcontents/mlbn-live (found in the hero node of the response)

description:

summary: SNLA+ contentCollections calls are made in 5 minute intervals
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the user sits stationary in the app
steps.result: THEN "contentCollections" calls are made via "graphql" every 5 minutes

summary: Carousel navigation to the left
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Home page
AND focus is assigned to a carousel

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the left arrow on the controller
steps.result:
THEN focus remains on the furthest left full tile
AND the tile that was previously to the left of the focused tile is now in the focused position of the carousel
AND focus remains on the tile when the user is focused on the first tile in the carousel
AND the user can no longer continue navigating left through the carousel once the beginning of the carousel has been reached

summary: Featured non-game tile selection - entitled
description:
GIVEN the user has the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
OR the user is a free user
AND the user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber selects an SVOD/SLIVE featured tile for playback
OR a free user selects a VOD/FLIVE featured tile for playback
steps.result:
THEN the entitled user is able to playback content
AND playback starts at the beginning
AND the scrubber displays for 10 seconds before being dismissed
AND users are navigated to the Home page after pressing the CIRCLE button on the controller
AND focus gets assigned to the "Watch Now" button in the hero

**Note:** If "Watch Now" button is not present in the Hero, focus should be assigned to the Home tab in the navigation header

summary: FLIVE - Free User
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is a free user
AND FLIVE content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the FLIVE content in the hero
AND a red pill with "LIVE" text displays left justified above the FLIVE title
AND the title for the FLIVE content in the hero is displayed
AND the description for non-game content in the hero is displayed
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text
AND the "Watch Now" button has focus when the Home page loads
AND the FLIVE content playback is successful after the user selects the "Watch Now" button

summary: MLB Network Not Entitled - Games Carousel
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is not entitled with the MLB Network entitlement (MLBN)
AND a game for the subscribers favorite team is present in the Hero
AND an MLB Network feed is returned in the "featured" node in the MAST response
AND "live: false" is returned in the the "hero" node in the MAST response

steps.action: WHEN the subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN MLB Network does not display in the Today’s Lineup carousel
AND MLB Network does not display in the Hero

summary: Game Data - Pregame - Hide Spoilers ON
description: GIVEN Hide Spoilers is ON

steps.action: WHEN a scheduled game is present in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN the away team probable pitcher is not displayed below the away team name
AND the home team probable pitcher is not displayed below the home team name

summary: SNY tab displays in the Header
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action: WHEN the user logs in
steps.result:
THEN the user should see [Home], [SNY], [Games], [Upgrade MLB.TV], [Settings] in the header

**NOTE:** If the test user also has one of the following entitlements, "EXECMLB", "MLBALL", "MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS", "MLBVIDEOAR", [Upgrade MLB.TV] will NOT display.

summary: Fetch SNY data via contentCollections
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121

steps.action: WHEN the user successfully logs in
steps.result:
THEN a "contentCollections" network call is made via "graphql"
AND the data returned from "contentCollections" is stored in Redux under "rsn"

**NOTE:** This needs to be tested with access to network calls, and Redux. Best way is via Chrome. Redux is a browser extension that may need to be downloaded and added to your browser.

summary: SNLA+ page loads
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNLA+
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in

**NOTE:** SNLA+ entitlement = SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [SNLA+] tab in the header
steps.result:
THEN the SNLA+ page loads successfully
AND SNLA+ content is present in the Hero
AND a title is present in the Hero
AND a description is present in the Hero
AND a SNLA+ related background image is present in the Featured Image space
AND the presented by Logo is displayed below the Hero content description
AND SNLA+ related carousels are displayed
AND VOD cards are displayed in the carousels for available VOD content

**NOTE:** "Presented By" and logo are feature flagged and may not display based on the set value. This can be checked in one of the following (based on environment) "base.json", "dev.json", "qa.json", "prod.json". Path: rsn -> snla -> enabled

summary: Basic non-game tiles - not entitled unfocused
description:
GIVEN the user is a free subscriber
AND the user does not have the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user is logged in
OR the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a logged in user views an unfocused SVOD basic tile
OR a not logged in user views any unfocused non-game basic tile
steps.result:
THEN the associated thumbnail displays
AND the duration of the SVOD content is displayed in the lower left corner of the thumbnail
AND the title is displayed left justified below the associated thumbnail
AND the video published date is displayed left justified below the title
AND the user sees a lock icon in the upper right corner of the tile
AND the tile is the same width as the game tiles
AND two tiles are the same width as one featured tile

summary: Game States - Preview/Scheduled - Delayed - Hide Spoilers ON

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Preview/Scheduled state
AND the game is Delayed
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (PV,PP,PY,PE,PA,PO,PR,PS,PG,PF,PC,PD,PB,PL,PI)
steps.result:
THEN a pill with the text "DELAYED" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero
AND only the game start time pill is displayed above the team matchup.

summary: Favorite team carousel doesn't display
description:
Given a user has an MLB account
AND a favorite team is not set

steps.action: WHEN the user loads the Home page
steps.result: THEN a carousel called "{team_name} Most Popular" does not display on the Home page

summary: Game States - Final - Cancelled - Hide Spoilers On

steps.action:
WHEN a game is in a Final state
AND the game is Cancelled
AND one of the following statusCode's are present in the MAST response: (CR,CS,CG,CV,CF,CC,CD,CB,CP,CL,CE,CA,CO,CI)
steps.result:
THEN a pill with the text "FINAL" is displayed above the team info in the Hero
AND a pill with the text "CANCELLED" is not displayed above the team info in the Hero

MANUAL

summary: SNY 24/7 feed - Mid-roll DAI Ads
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for SNY
AND the user launches the MLB.TV app
AND the user logs in
AND the user has initiated playback of the 24/7 SNY feed
AND the 24/7 SNY stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND an asset key is is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** SNY entitlement = SNY_121
Enter "graphql" into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession
THIS NEEDS TO BE TESTED IN A BROWSER

steps.action: WHEN an ad break is triggered
steps.result:
THEN we should see ads playing back
AND "id3-events.json" network calls are being made
AND the "id3-events.json" network calls have a request URL starting with "https://dai.google.com/"

**NOTE:** Entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools should filter out the id3-events.json network calls

summary: CCPA Parameter to DAI opt in/out - Live Game
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for Live game playback
AND the user has not opt'd out of CCPA
OR the user has opt'd out of CCPA

**NOTE:**
Launch the app in the browser and open the Network tab in DevTools. 
- For Legacy/DSS enter us_privacy=1Y in the search box of the Network tab.
- For DM5 enter streams in the search box of the Network tab.

Opt'd out test account: tvccpa@gmail.com / Password23 in both QA/PROD with MLBALL/SUBSCRIBERVOD

All other tests accounts should NOT be opt'd out

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates playback of a live game
steps.result:
THEN parameter us_privacy=1YYY is passed for users that have opt'd out
AND parameter us_privacy=1YNY is passed for users that have not opt'd out

**NOTE:**
us_privacy parameter will at the end of the dai request after the user initiates playback

summary: Condensed Game - Playback dismiss
description:
GIVEN a user has selected a game tile for an archive game
AND the user has initiated playback of a Condensed Game from the Feed Select modal
AND the scrubber bar is not displaying in the video player

steps.action: WHEN the user presses the CIRCLE button on the controller
steps.result:
THEN the video player is dismissed
AND focus is assigned to the previously selected game tile

summary: IMA SDK is being used - Archive
description:
GIVEN an Archive game stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND a cmsId and a videoId is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** 
IMA SDK supported platforms: PS5
Enter graphql into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession

steps.action: WHEN entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools
steps.result: THEN the "streams" call has "pubads.g.doubleclick.net*" as the request URL

summary: Archive Game Away feed without bookmarks
description:
GIVEN a user navigates to a past day with games
AND the game has an away feed
AND videoFeeds for the game have a mediaState of MEDIA_ARCHIVE
AND the user has the appropriate entitlements to watch archive games
AND the user has not previously played the away feed of the archive game

steps.result:

AND the video player maximizes to full screen
AND the away video feed starts playing from the beginning of the feed

summary: IMA SDK is being used - Live
description:
GIVEN a LIVE game stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND an asset key is is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** 
Enter graphql into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a Live in-progress ads enabled feed for playback
AND entering "stream" into the Network search of Dev Tools
AND an ad break occurs
steps.result:
THEN the "streams" call has "pubads.g.doubleclick.net*" as the request URL
AND ads playback during ad breaks

summary: IMA SDK - Failed calls do not result in a video error - Live
description:
GIVEN a LIVE game stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND an asset key is is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** 
Enter graphql into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession

steps.action:
WHEN network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net*" and "dai.google.com" are blocked
OR network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net*" and "dai.google.com" are failing
steps.result: THEN the stream continues to playback through ad breaks with no video error modal popping up

GIVEN a live game has a national broadcast video feed
AND the logged in user is entitled to the feed
AND the user is in a blacked out market

**Example:** 
FOX Saturday Baseball
ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a game tile for a live national game
steps.result:
THEN a modal displays with the match up at the top
AND a the following blackout message displays "This game is unavailable in your area. All Regular Season and Postseason live games are subject to blackout restrictions due to Major League Baseball exclusivities. An archive copy of the game will be available 90 minutes after the game."

summary: Resume National Feed Selection

AND videoFeeds for the game have a mediaState of MEDIA_ON
AND the user has the appropriate entitlements to watch the national feed
AND the user has previously played the feed

AppleTV+ w/ EXEC entitlement
Peacock w/ EXEC entitlement
ESPN Sunday Night Baseball w/ EXEC entitlement

steps.result:

AND the video player maximizes to full screen
AND the national video feed starts playing from the bookmarked/last watched point

summary: IMA SDK - Failed calls do not result in a video error - Archive
description:
GIVEN an Archive game stream has adsEnabled equals true in the graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adsEnabled)
AND a cmsId and a videoId is returned in the same graphql Preview/Response (data->initPlaybackSession->adExperience->adEngineIdentifiers)

**NOTE:** 
Enter graphql into the Network search of Dev Tools to find the initPlaybackSession

steps.action:
WHEN network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net*" and "dai.google.com" are blocked
OR network calls to "pubads.g.doubleclick.net*" and "dai.google.com" are failing
steps.result: THEN the stream continues to playback with no video error modal popping up

summary: CCPA Parameter to DAI opt in/out - Archive Game
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for Archive game playback
AND the user has not opt'd out of CCPA
OR the user has opt'd out of CCPA

**NOTE:**
Launch the app in the browser and open the Network tab in DevTools. 
- For Legacy/DSS enter us_privacy=1Y in the search box of the Network tab.
- For DM5 enter streams in the search box of the Network tab.
Opt'd out test account: tvccpa@gmail.com / Password23 in both QA/PROD with MLBALL/SUBSCRIBERVOD

All other tests accounts should NOT be opt'd out

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates playback of an archive game
steps.result:
THEN parameter us_privacy=1YYY is passed for users that have opt'd out
AND parameter us_privacy=1YNY is passed for users that have not opt'd out

**NOTE:**
us_privacy parameter will at the end of the dai request after the user initiates playback

summary: Live/In-Progress Game Feed Select Modal UI Design - Home and Away feeds
description:

AND the subscriber is on the Games page
AND games have videoFeeds with a mediaState of MEDIA_ON

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a game tile for a live/in-progress game
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Select modal displays
AND the Away team logo/colors should be visible top left
AND the Home team logo/colors should be visible top right
AND a video icon followed by the text "Video" is displayed centered above the away and home video feed buttons
AND the away video feed button displays on the left side of the feed select modal
AND the away video feed button contains the team abbreviation followed by the video feed call letters
AND the away video feed button has focus
AND the away video feed button decreases in size slightly when it loses focus
AND the home video feed button displays on the right side of the feed select modal
AND the home video feed button contains the team abbreviation followed by the video feed call letters
AND the home video feed button does not have focus
AND the home video feed button increases in size slightly when it has focus
AND the user cannot navigate through elements behind the modal

summary: Ad breaks logged in DataDog
description:
GIVEN a user has access to DataDog
AND is viewing Playback Heuristics in DataDog
AND a user is logged in with dm5tv3@gmail.com / PasswordDM5
AND has initiated playback of a Live ads enabled stream

**NOTE:** 
URL for Playback Heuristics: https://us5.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%22PLAYBACK%20HEURISTICS%22%20%40usr.id%3A00u24vtyge3Pzk2rY0h8&agg_m=%40event.metadata.currentBitrate&agg_m_source=base&agg_q=%40asset.isLive&agg_q_source=base&agg_t=avg&analyticsOptions=%5B%22line%22%2C%22dog_classic%22%2Cnull%2Cnull%5D&cols=host%2Cservice%2C%40usr.id%2C%40event.action%2C%40event.reason%2C%40event.metadata.convivaTimestamp&context_event=AY_CgMDtAAD8tvFqYXPtGgAB&fromUser=true&messageDisplay=inline&refresh_mode=sliding&storage=hot&stream_sort=%40convivaTimestamp%2Casc&top_n=10&top_o=top&view=spans&viz=&x_missing=true&from_ts=1726669870274&to_ts=1726684270274&live=true

The tester may need to update the User ID in DataDog to the Okta ID of the test user from the test environment.

steps.action: WHEN a complete ad break plays
steps.result:
THEN the following action and reason are logged in DataDog at an ad break start: 
Action - player_state_change 
Reason - player_ad_break_started
AND the following action and reason are logged in DataDog at an ad break end: 
Action - player_state_change 
Reason - player_ad_break_end

summary: Empty Feed Selection
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in

AND the Away team logo/colors should be visible top left
AND the Home team logo/colors should be visible top right
AND a broadcast tower icon is displayed
AND the following text is displayed "You're a bit early! There are no feeds available yet. Please come back later."
AND the user cannot navigate through elements behind the modal
